programme.title: Barney and Friends: Play Piano With Me!
programme.desc: The children learn all about the piano when they play games, listen to real pianos and even play a little themselves.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Splish! Splash!
programme.desc: A "too hot" afternoon becomes a "totally cool" day when Barney introduces his friends to the wonders of water.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Grace’s food drive isn’t going very well until Melanie offers to help. Melanie comes up with the perfect idea to get people to donate – put on a movie premiere in the caboose!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Bunches of Boxes!
programme.desc: A day of imaginative play and fun for Barney and his young friends is kicked off by the arrival of a variety of boxes from the "Enjoy-Your-Toys Company." Surprisingly, every box is empty!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Movement - Separation
programme.desc: When some children in the park invite Barney to join them for a race, BJ and Baby Bop decide he'll need their help. They show him several ways to get ready for the big race by warming up and stretching.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: I'm A Builder
programme.desc: When Baby Bop wonders about the noises she hears, Barney explains that the sounds are from big trucks and machines at a nearby construction site. This inspires BJ to build something himself—a wind-up toy robot.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Riffs Musical Zoo - Boats
programme.desc: Everyone is excited about an upcoming trip to the zoo. When the trip is postponed, Riff decides to create a musical zoo. He gathers instruments that sound like real animals. Everyone has a wonderful time at Riff's musical zoo.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Gift Of The Dinos - Winter
programme.desc: It's Christmas and BJ dreams of getting a new baseball glove to go with his baseball, while Riff hopes for new drumsticks to use his drum. Barney reminds them that Christmas is more than just getting gifts and helps them learn the meaning of Christmas.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop can't find anybody to play with her. When the others see her feeling sad, they decide to play whatever she wants to play. The dinos and kids are planning a camp-out at the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Stop! Go!
programme.desc: After playing with "Stop" and "Go" signs with Angela, Baby Bop leaves to direct some traffic of her own! Meanwhile, in the caboose, Barney and the kids enjoy a costume parade, a game of "Musical Stop & Go," and some very vigorous body movement.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Riff can’t find his drumsticks anywhere. Barney helps Baby Bop explore many different jobs.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: After BJ loses everyone's tickets to the circus, he learns a valuable lesson about responsibility. Baby Bop discovers a lonely little flower struggling to grow in a shady spot.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ wants to learn Terry's fancy basketball moves. After some advice from Barney, BJ has fun while doing his best! On a campout, Baby Bop sees a falling star and wants to return it to the sky.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When he tries to join some older kids in jump-roping, Daniel fails miserably. He becomes convinced that he’s just too little to do anything right.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A-Counting We Will Go!
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Baby Bop count to ten by playing games, and visiting a Make-Believe Market.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Three Lines, Three Corners
programme.desc: Barney and his friends play hopscotch—with a twist. Whitney is learning about triangles at school, so Angela created Triangle Hopscotch to help reinforce "triangles."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ brings his brand-new toy plane to the park. Baby Bop is having a great time playing with her homemade boat.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Best In Show - Ducks And Fish
programme.desc: When the kids decide to have a Dog Show to show off their pets, BJ feels a little left out. He doesn't have a dog, and he sure wishes he did! A friend from the park shares her dog with BJ so he can join in the fun.
programme.sub-title: Best In Show - Ducks And Fish

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is pretending to be a great detective, and needs a mystery to solve! Barney sees Riff protecting a nest full of duck eggs.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Rabbits - Listen
programme.desc: BJ is pretending to be a great detective. But all great detectives need a mystery to solve! One quickly comes his way when an animal nibbles on one of Baby Bop's healthy snacks.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney reminds Riff and BJ that Christmas is about more than getting gifts. Barney takes Melanie on a trip to the North Pole to deliver her letter in person.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Parade of Bikes
programme.desc: It's the day of the bike parade. But Nick has had a bike accident that leaves his bike in need of repair by Mr. Boyd. Barney helps Baby Bop and the children learn all about bicycles—and that they are a wonderful way to exercise and have fun.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Moving Along
programme.desc: Barney plays a fun game of "Simon Says" with Baby Bop and BJ in the park. They demonstrate how to move their bodies through dancing and playing games.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: A creepy spider inspires Barney to tell the story of “The Reluctant Dragon.”

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids take imaginary trips to different countries with the magical caboose.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Sweeter Than Candy
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and BJ are helping the park kids get ready for a school play. When Barney tells everyone that putting on shows began in Greece, they want to go visit! While there, they meet some friends and decide to put on a play in an amphitheatre.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: China - Welcome, Cousin Riff
programme.desc: BJ is waiting for a very special letter from his pen pal in China. The letter reveals that his pen pal is coming for a visit. With the help of friends in the park, BJ hurries to get the park ready.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: My Family and Me
programme.desc: The children are invited to a family picnic in the park, but don't know who invited them. The invitations instruct them to bring a family treasure, so each child has something special with them. Barney helps lead a discussion about families.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's Showtime!
programme.desc: Barney, BJ and the kids spend the day preparing for a performance for their friends in the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When several sports balls suddenly disappear without a trace, it’s detective BJ to the rescue as he dons trenchcoat and fedora.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop's blankey seems to be getting smaller. But Barney shows her that Baby Bop is growing. Barney and his friends help Riff see the dentist is nothing to be afraid of.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Hot Commodity
programme.desc: Allen is late to the auction, leaving Ton to battle a feisty female auction buyer on his own! The guys find a fully functional flamethrower and a rare hand-carved bow and arrow set from South America!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Money Makin' Monster Machines
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes on the attack & ends up on a collision course with a hardened veteran auction buyer. They uncover a collection of speedy off-road vehicles and some hardcore heavy metal from the turn-of the-century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangster Whiskey
programme.desc: Allen and Ton trek to an auction in Moreno Valley, CA, where two locker wins yield a vintage jukebox, a valuable baseball card and a Prohibition-era moonshine still.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Half Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: 1970s Z-Flex Jimmy Plumer Poolrider skateboard with artwork by Doug Smith; Kevlar bulletproof vest, ballistic facemask and a helmet used by S.W.A.T. teams; a pair of 1990s racing pocket bikes capable of going 80 mph.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Disco and Dice
programme.desc: 1978 Williams Disco pinball machine; 1898 dice popper gambling device; talking 1990s bar top breathalyzer; deadly fishing harpoon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Everything's Bigger in Texas
programme.desc: Winchester 1886 rifle invented to kill buffalo; collection of 1950s electric Slot Cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: Ton and Allen duke it out with a local thrift store gang at a Brooklyn storage auction. The guys discover a classic arcade redemption game and a mid-century water cannon designed to fight towering infernos!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chicago Grand Slam
programme.desc: 1984 Yamaha SS440 Snowmobile that introduced the revolutionary shock absorber suspension; rare autographed 1920s baseball glove; mint Hank Aaron signed baseball; authentic 1950s Robby the Robot collector toy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Voodoo Moola
programme.desc: Allen & Ton hit a storage auction in Louisiana's Capitol City and quickly find themselves in trouble with the law! The guys uncover a pair of racing lawnmowers and then stumble on an antique barber chair from the early 1900s!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Got a Gun
programme.desc: In the affluent area of Mission Hills, CA, Allen and Ton pick up an estate unit that contains a minibike, a Depression-era slot machine and an 1871 Colt revolver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Dead Aim
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face-off against an auction buyer with shady bidding tactics and even more questionable fashion sense. The guys find a custom-built monowheel & a rifle designed to ward off grave robbers in the early 19th century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Viva la Vegas
programme.desc: 1974 death-defying Zig Zag magic sword box, an ultra-rare 1910 poster of the infamous magician Chung Ling Soo, an 1800s naval cane sword and century-old Metlach German beer steins.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hot Wheels
programme.desc: '70s sand rail dune racer with rally hemi heads; 1965 replica Mustang pool table; off-road racing gear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rodeo Ton
programme.desc: 1970s El Toro mechanical bull used to train bull riders; silver WWII era banjo; a collection of 1800s handcrafted hunting duck decoys.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sin City Shootout
programme.desc: 1953 Chevy-inspired bumper car; scores of M16 30-round magazines; reproduction 1940s boardwalk photobooth; aerosol-powered spud gun potato launchers.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Early Bird Special
programme.desc: Vintage Shooting Star carnival game; professional Mixed Martial Arts octagon fighting cage.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Top Gun Ton
programme.desc: Scale RC Viper FanJet aircraft with a potent jet engine; 1920s Gundlach Korona large format field camera used for photography expeditions. Ton pilots a plane, but crashes and burns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Weapons of Past Destruction
programme.desc: Knowing that Hollywood auctions are hit-and-miss, Allen and Ton buy inexpensive lockers that contain a polygraph machine, a samurai sword and a pair of Civil War shotguns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chi-Town Showdown
programme.desc: Metal Victorian-era burial casket; 1870s glass fire extinguisher grenades; a mechanical 1896 handcrafted Chicago fire station alarm box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Strat'ed for Cash
programme.desc: On a limited budget in the historic L.A. neighborhood of West Adams, Allen and Ton still win three lockers and find a Maui Blue Fender Stratocaster and a 1930s Schwinn bike.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Diesel Digs
programme.desc: The guys head to the industrial hub of LA to score some heavy machinery and unearth a 1981 Bobcat 743 Frontloader, one of the first powered by a diesel engine and a trench-defending WWI German Sturmtrupp helmet bashing mace.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Got Balls
programme.desc: After returning to LA, Ton & Allen head deep into hostile auction hunter territory and butt heads with a familiar old foe! They discover a driving range golf ball picker vehicle and one of the most accurate rifles ever made!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Choo-Choo, Cha-Ching!
programme.desc: Ton and Allen get a surprise second chance after nearly getting shut out in the small town of Palmer. They uncover a motorized railroad maintenance car from the 1960's and a pre-WWI Japanese semi-automatic pistol.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Battle Bought
programme.desc: Mint 1800s French "Harmonica Pistol" and a collection of '90s remote controlled combat robots.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cold Hard Cash
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go North to Alaska and get a cold reception from the local auctioneer. They find two enormous seaplane pontoons and a pair of Smith & Wesson revolvers, including the most powerful production handgun in the world!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: 1905 Hand-crank Thomas Edison gramophone with cylindrical records; a discontinued Addictor 190 Mini Boat; a rare 1897 Regina music box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: High Flying Ton
programme.desc: A nerdy auction buyer tests Ton and Allen's patience at a big container auction in Ventura. The guys discover a basket and burners for a hot air balloon and a 19th century German single shot rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Labor of Love
programme.desc: Harley Davidson V-twin EVO engine and revolutionary 1958 dual-suspension swingarm frame; '80s Ms. Pac-Man arcade machine; rare Air Jordan vintage shoe collection in mint condition.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Little-Ton Jones
programme.desc: Allen & Ton try to get the inside scoop on their competition by chatting up local auction buyers. The guys find some heavy gold-mining machinery from the 1950s & an amateur rocket that can travel faster than the speed of sound!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Beantown Bidders
programme.desc: 1800s blackpowder whaling harpoon; 1940s Schwinn Town & Country tandem bicycle; a vintage American flag collection that could be worth thousands.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Wild West
programme.desc: Allen and Ton explain their strategies at a storage auction in San Bernardino, win two units, then have a Pepperbox gun and vintage Lionel train set appraised by experts.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Miami Heat
programme.desc: All-terrain Air Commander Hovercraft, a 1970s NASA countdown clock and a one-of-a-kind 1960s Delta Relay rocket.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Real Thing
programme.desc: Allen and Ton compete with a notorious deep-pocketed bidder in Oxnard, CA, and score a vintage Coca-Cola vending machine, a vintage desk and a rare 1971 GMC truck.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Driller Instinct
programme.desc: Ton & Allen encounter aggressive outdoorsmen in the Alaskan wilderness. The guys discover an 8-wheeled ATV that travels on both land & water and an air percussion hammer that can drill through solid rock!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Friends in Hawaii Places
programme.desc: Allen &Ton enlist an assistant, Carolyn, and Allen's Hawaiian buddy, Junior, to help them battle local buyers. The guys find a WWII-era motor scooter and a stash of antique Polynesian tattoo tools that get used on Ton!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Ruff Day
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to an auction in Ton's hometown and end up battling with a big-mouthed buyer. They discover a pair of tranquilizer dart guns and also end up fighting with a K9!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Home on the Gun Range
programme.desc: Barely making it to an auction in Corona, CA, Allen and Ton buy an overstuffed unit and find an antique crossbow, a rare 10-gauge Winchester shotgun and a 1940s Kiss-o-Meter.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Bowling Pin Payday
programme.desc: Allen & Ton visit Ton's old stompin' ground and go head-to-head with a trash-talking auction buyer. They uncover a 19th century rifle with a matching cutlass bayonet and a mechanical bowling pinsetter from the early 1960's!

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Dr. Drew hosts a look at the exclusive moments we never saw with Farrah, Maci, Catelynn and Amber from the final season of Teen Mom. (S4, ep14)

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Dr. Drew hosts the Teen Moms in front of a live studio audience. Catelynn, Tyler, and Farrah reflect on their journeys in the last four seasons. (S4, ep16)
programme.sub-title: Series Finale Special: Check Up With Dr. Drew Part 1

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Maci drops a bombshell about her relationship with Kyle, and shares the stage for the first time with Ryan's new girlfriend. Gary reflects on his journey with Amber. (S4, ep17)
programme.sub-title: Series Finale Special: Check Up With Dr. Drew Part 2

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Keep It Moving
programme.desc: Javi blows up over something he finds on Kailyn's phone. Chelsea is shocked when Adam requests 50/50 custody of Aubree. Leah has to face Corey in court for custody of their daughters.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Leah has to take a court-ordered drug test. Chelsea joins forces with Adam's ex to fight his custody request. Kailyn & Javi's issues boil over when she spends a night away with friends.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jenelle and Nathan's explosive arguing threatens her chance of gaining custody of Jace. Corey presses for more time with the girls, while Leah and Jeremy's marriage crumbles.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Not Good Enough
programme.desc: Despite efforts, Leah and Corey's co-parenting relationship takes a turn for the worse. Barbara and Jace visit Jenelle. Kailyn and Javi seriously discuss the future of their marriage.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: After filing for full custody of Jace, Jenelle comes to blows with Barb. Kailyn and Javi's marital problems follow her all the way to LA.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Walk Out
programme.desc: Chelsea hears worrisome news about Taylor that could affect her court case. Leah begins to unravel. Nathan's suspicious behaviour forces Jenelle to rethink their engagement.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: After a physical altercation with Jenelle, Nathan gets arrested. Divorce papers from Jeremy cause Leah to reach her breaking point. Chelsea and Adam finally face each other in court.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: What Makes You Happy
programme.desc: Jenelle pleads with Nathan to stay together. Kailyn worries if Jo's move is too close for comfort. Overwhelmed by a looming divorce and custody threats, Leah makes a big decision.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Corey's threats force Leah to return from therapy. Jenelle and Nathan struggle to co-parent through their broken relationship. Kailyn and Javi must adjust to Jo and Vee living so close.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Expect a Miracle
programme.desc: Kailyn is torn between Javi and Jo. Leah finalized her divorce with Jeremy and prepares to return to therapy. Jenelle and Barbara meet in court to discuss custody of Jace.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Sorry Not Sorry
programme.desc: Jenelle faces felony charges after a fight with Nathan and his new girl. Chelsea notices Adam's actions are affecting Aubree. Kailyn loses it when Jo goes MIA. Leah ends her marriage.

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Puppy Love
programme.desc: Sassi tries to stay calm on a romantic getaway. Amber gives Ste the cold shoulder. Sleep-deprived Chloe questions if getting a puppy was a good idea. Shannon resits her GCSEs. (S4, ep3)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: This Girl Can
programme.desc: Sassi is a woman on a mission as she starts her new job. Shannon heads to the seaside where Charlie's wandering eye threatens to derail their family holiday. Ste lays his heart on the line. (S4, ep4)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: A New Normal
programme.desc: Sassi moves into her dream home with Darren, Amber meets a new man, Chloe and Jordan try to freshen up their relationship, while a stressed out Shannon is desperate for time on her own. (S4, ep5)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Shannon and Charlie come to blows in Spain while Amber's flying high in Benidorm. Sassi is missing home, and Chloe's relationship reaches breaking point. (S4, ep6)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Leap Of Faith
programme.desc: Jordan gives Chloe the birthday surprise of her life! Shannon and Charlie decide to split. Sassi connects to her faith and gets a lot off her chest. Amber's birthday ends in tears. (S4, ep7)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Shock And Surprise
programme.desc: Jordan whisks Chloe away to Paris for a big portion of romance and snails! Shannon thinks she might be pregnant. It's a big day for Sassi, and Amber comes to a decision about Ste. (S4, ep8)

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Alex
programme.desc: Alex finding out she's pregnant at 16 puts everything on hold. Her boyfriend Matt is also growing increasingly unreliable, and Alex considers whether adoption might be the best choice.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Jordan
programme.desc: Jordan and her sister were models and best friends until Jordan's pregnancy put all that on hold. Now her boyfriend and her sister are competing to be her number one.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Myranda
programme.desc: Myranda finds that love isn't the answer to everything when she gets pregnant. As her mum battles substance abuse, Myranda and her boyfriend struggle with preparing for a baby on their own.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Sarah
programme.desc: Sarah and Blake were high school sweethearts, until an unexpected pregnancy began to pull them apart. Blake wants to move away for work, but Sarah needs him to stick around for their baby.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Hope
programme.desc: Ex-party girl Hope is pregnant after losing her virginity to Ben, a guy she barely knows. Hope and Ben try to make a go of their relationship in order to provide a good family for the baby.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Sabrina
programme.desc: Sabrina used to be a cool California girl, with an athlete boyfriend and big group of friends. When she gets pregnant, Sabrina must start a new life, and hopes her boyfriend will come too.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Devon
programme.desc: Devon wants to raise her baby with her boyfriend Colin, an Iraq war veteran who is still in the reserves. If Colin is deployed, can Devon handle not living at home?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Kristina
programme.desc: When Kristina's boyfriend Todd dies just weeks after the couple finds out she's pregnant, Kristina must deal with the tragic loss while also preparing to welcome their baby into the world.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Catch up with girls from Season 3 and find out about the engagements, surprise break ups, crazy living arrangements and family feuds that have taken place since the cameras stopped rolling.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Maddy
programme.desc: Maddy, an all-American girl from Illinois, gets pregnant from a one night stand. Will Maddy choose to live with the father of her child and his family, or move away to live with her father?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Autumn
programme.desc: In this episode, ex-party girl Autumn tries to get her boyfriend to straighten up before their bundle of joy arrives.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Millina
programme.desc: Millina's mum is in jail, and partner Trevor's mum faces her own problems. Will this expectant couple be able to give their son the stability they never had growing up?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Arianna
programme.desc: Arianna from Georgia was your typical high school girl. After becoming pregnant with Maurice's child, the two began fighting. Maurice eventually steps up but will Arianna forgive him?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Summer
programme.desc: Summer's mum has struggled with addiction. Summer wants her mum in her life, but can she believe her promises of being sober and there for her and the baby?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Karley
programme.desc: Karley wasn't able to resist the charms of bad boy Tony. Shortly into their relationship, she finds out she's pregnant with twins. Can Tony settle down and be a responsible dad?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Aleah
programme.desc: Aleah met her boyfriend Shawn in a juvenile detention centre. Now they live together and Aleah is pregnant with health worries. Will the couple be able to cope?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Jazmin
programme.desc: Jazmin was a motivated teenager from a strict family. She fell in love with Dell and got pregnant at 17. Can she gain back her parents' trust and allow Dell to spend time with their baby?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Jordan
programme.desc: Girly girl Jordan from Baltimore is kicked out by her parents when she falls pregnant by Derek. Now homeless and struggling financially, how will the young couple cope?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Savon
programme.desc: Savon had big dreams before falling pregnant with the school's most notorious player, Ely. After being dumped while pregnant she meets a new man, but can she convince him to stick around?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Courtney
programme.desc: Pregnant Courtney has decided to reclaim her abstinence - which leaves her boyfriend Scott feeling frustrated and alone. Will their relationship survive Courtney's born-again virgin stance?

programme.title: CSI: New York: Down The Rabbit Hole
programme.desc: A murder victim bears a striking resemblance to a well-known avatar in the online role-playing game Second Life. Mac is forced to enter the game himself to solve the mystery surrounding her death. The assassin (Suspect X) escapes.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Buzzkill
programme.desc: When a supermodel is found dead in a giant martini glass on a Times Square billboard, Stella and Lindsay follow the evidence in search of the party crasher.

programme.title: CSI: New York: One Wedding and a Funeral
programme.desc: Mac, Danny and Hawkes investigates a groom murdered on his wedding day, found stuffed and wrapped like a wedding present. Stella and Lindsay investigate when a jigsaw covered in blood is left on Stella's car.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Child's Play
programme.desc: Flack and Stella investigate a man killed by an exploding cigar. Danny and his neighbor Ruben stumble on a bodega robbery and the boy is killed by a stray bullet. Danny is filled with guilt because he was supposed to be responsible for the child.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Happily Never After
programme.desc: A notorious hotel owner known for her meanness is found dead under an ice sculpture, and the clues to the death of a second woman who fell to her death onto a school bus can be found in the book "Peter Pan."

programme.title: CSI: New York: Personal Foul
programme.desc: As the search for the "Cabbie Killer" continues, riding a cab gets very deadly. The team must figure out how to keep New York City safe.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Veritas
programme.desc: Immediately following the previous season finale, the team is investigating the death of a woman named Lauren Salinas who is linked to the bank robbery. She turns out to be a friend of Flack's sister Samantha.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Page Turner
programme.desc: When two people turn up dead with radiation poisoning, it sparks an urgent investigation before it turns into a deadly outbreak in New York City when it's tracked down to a book at the NYC Library.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Turbulence
programme.desc: When an Air Marshal turns up dead on a flight on which Mac is a passenger, the victim it turns out, isn't a Marshal at all. The real Marshal was killed earlier and his ID stolen.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Sex, Lies, and Silicone
programme.desc: When a prominent journalist named Ann Steele turns up dead at a street party, the investigation leads the team to a life-size silicone doll company.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Dead Inside
programme.desc: A man is found dead in a basement, but the house where the death occurred is found miles away on a barge in the East River. Meanwhile, Flack discovers that his sister lost her job and has a drinking problem.

programme.title: CSI: New York: My Name Is Mac Taylor
programme.desc: When two men who share the same name as detective Mac Taylor are killed, detective Taylor rounds up all the other Mac Taylors in New York and tries to figure out who will be the next victim.

programme.title: CSI: New York: The Triangle
programme.desc: CSI investigates the death of a armored truck security guard, which appears to be related to a disturbance at a so-called "Bermuda Triangle" of electric activity near the Empire State Building.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Rush To Judgment
programme.desc: While investigating the death and dismemberment of a high school wrestling coach, detective Flack gets in trouble when a suspect dies in his custody.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Green Piece
programme.desc: An environmental terrorist group bombs the home of an electronics recycler, and his daughter is killed--but the daughter is part of the terrorist group. Meanwhile, Danny considers proposing to Lindsay again.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Communication Breakdown
programme.desc: CSI tries to figure who is responsible for the death of the chief of a Native American tribe who were some of the original inhabitants of Manhattan.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Taxi
programme.desc: The taxi cab killer whom the CSI New York team has been trying to catch strikes again, only this time it’s at the expense of a New Jersey cop.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Hostage
programme.desc: A bank robbery has Mac doing crime investigation from inside to help the robber prove he didn’t kill one of the hostages.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Veritas
programme.desc: The bank robbery saga from last season continues as Mac seeks revenge after nearly being killed by the mysterious Joe.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Page Turner
programme.desc: A free street concert quickly turns into a crime scene, the victim, in this case, has been mysteriously plagued with radiation.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Dead Air
programme.desc: The CSI team must locate a woman who has been kidnapped and dialed a wrong number on her cell phone. To locate her, the team must first figure out who the kidnapped woman was trying to contact.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Open Water
programme.desc: A cruise ship docked in Miami is the scene of a double murder. The team investigates the long list of potential suspects and soon the list is dramatically shortened when the CSI’s find a large amount of money missing from the victim’s stateroom.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: CSI Trilogy: Shock
programme.desc: During an A-list house party, an heiress is found electrocuted in her own bathtub. The list of suspects includes her musician boyfriend, her assistant, and her main modelling rival.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: CSI Trilogy: Rampage
programme.desc: The Mala Noche gang trial is stopped when the defendant escapes with the help of a fake witness and a gunman in the audience. Delko finds that a beautiful but disturbed ex-lover is stalking any woman who he is now close too, including his sister.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: CSI Trilogy: One of Our Own
programme.desc: Horatio and Delko search Miami to bring down the Mala Noche gang once and for all. The quest to end the crime-spree is jeopardized when Federal agents, led by Agent Glen Cole, raid the CSI lab searching for missing cash evidence, based on an unknown tip.
programme.sub-title: CSI Trilogy: One of Our Own

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Going Under
programme.desc: A biker who falls off a balcony was an undercover A.T.F. agent. The gang he infiltrated may be running "corner-shot" guns designed for urban warfare, and another agent who also infiltrated the group may hold the key to the case.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Death Pool 100
programme.desc: The murder of a young socialite could be connected to a death pool, an offshore gambling boat, and a counterfeiting ring.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Curse of the Coffin
programme.desc: Wolfe believes that he may have triggered a Santeria curse when he disturbs a miniature coffin at a murder scene.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: High Octane
programme.desc: The investigation into a beheading during a stunt at an automobile "sideshow" could ultimately expose a larger cover-up involving stolen cars and jet fuel.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Darkroom
programme.desc: CSI steps up the search for potential serial killer who may be connected to a professional photographer after it discovers that Natalia's sister may be the next victim.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Come As You Are
programme.desc: The death of a Marine recruiter ultimately leads Horatio to open an investigation into the death of a soldier in Iraq. The soldier's brother claims responsibility, but Horatio suspects a cover-up.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Internal Affairs
programme.desc: When Natalia's ex is found dead at his home, Horatio must step into the investigation to keep his team safe from an overeager investigator.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: No Man's Land
programme.desc: The robbery of a police truck containing confiscated weapons is connected to a plot to spring Clavo Cruz from prison, and one of the guns stolen in the robbery is used in the shooting of a young boy.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Man Down
programme.desc: While the manhunt for Clavo Cruz continues, Delko fights for his life after the shooting.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Triple Threat
programme.desc: A real estate developer is murdered, and the investigation uncovers a complex web of deceit involving his wife her two identical triplet sisters. But the apparently-murdered developer may have had a surprise of his own.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Rush
programme.desc: An actor is found dead in the trunk of a stunt car, but the investigation reveals that he actually died in his room at a high-profile celebrity rehab facility.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Tunnel Vision
programme.desc: A body in a sinkhole leads Horatio and the CSI team to a robbery, while investigating they discover the target holds a shocking secret.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Rock and a Hard Place
programme.desc: When Alexx's son becomes a suspect in a murder, saving him has dire consequences. Horatio and the CSI team must act to clear him.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Down To the Wire
programme.desc: When a man is killed due to a fake 911 call, Horatio must face off with a private investigator who is systematically destroying the team.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Going Ballistic
programme.desc: When someone is determined to take down Horatio and the CSI team, Horatio puts his life on the line in order to save his team.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Raise the Dead
programme.desc: When a tip comes in suggesting foul play on a 71yr old man, Lt. Joe Kenda is left with only one way to reveal the truth: exhume the body from its grave.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My First Case
programme.desc: In his first case with the homicide unit, rookie burglary detective Joe Kenda volunteers to work a bloody multi-victim shooting deemed “unsolvable” by the veterans.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Justified
programme.desc: A young man is found gunned down, leading Lt. Joe Kenda to delve into his troubled past and his connection to the world of rare coins.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Run for your Life
programme.desc: A slain body of a marathon runner is found just hours before a big race. With the help of a trusted K-9 officer, Kenda sets off to find the killer himself before he strikes again.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Tighten the Screws
programme.desc: When young Iraq War veteran Curtis Ashley ends up dead, Lt. Joe Kenda has to solve the slaying of a seemingly innocent victim using his keen awareness of the criminal mind.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Magic Bullet
programme.desc: A hard-working father of two is shot in the head just steps from a notorious strip club. The case is stuck in neutral until Kenda uncovers a conspiracy organized by an unlikely triggerman.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My, My, Merry Christmas
programme.desc: Donald Ott is found shot to death, friends tell police he didn’t have an enemy in the world. But when Lt. Joe Kenda speaks with family, he learns of a relative who might hold the key to the mystery.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Rearview Mirror
programme.desc: When a retired military man runs over a pedestrian, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine if it was bad brakes or bad intent.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My Worst Fear
programme.desc: Police are shocked to find a 13-year-old boy killed in an explosion, but their grief turns to alarm when they discover a second, unexploded bomb.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Line Goes Dead
programme.desc: When the severed head of a wife and mother is found, Lt. Joe Kenda uses forensics and interrogation to find both her body and her killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Metal on Metal
programme.desc: A athlete is gunned down just weeks before starting college, leaving family heartbroken and detectives stumped. The man seems an unlikely target, until Lt. Joe Kenda pries into his personal life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: John 3:16
programme.desc: A man rushes his friend to the hospital with serious gunshot wounds, reporting they were robbed by strangers. When the facts don’t add up, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team go on the hunt.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Knock Knock
programme.desc: A gathering of friends turns deadly when two gunmen shoot William Davis in the head. Kenda and his team dig into his past and start to suspect someone in William’s circle is lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Murder Bites
programme.desc: A young woman is found naked and strangled in a park not 200 yards from her home. It isn’t until Lt. Joe Kenda rethinks the entire case that he realizes someone has been lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Time Bomb
programme.desc: In 1978, Lt. Joe Kenda is new to the CSPD, and gets more than he bargains for when a local bank is the target of a massive explosion.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Devil’s Den
programme.desc: Baffled by the animal instincts of a cross country killer whose crimes seem to go dormant in winter, authorities ultimately follow his tracks to a den of deceit in the frozen tundra of Alaska.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Bitter Blade
programme.desc: When a beautiful home healthcare worker disappears, loved ones lead the search for her safe return. A series of incoming text messages reveal a soul-crushing truth and a murder most evil.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Christmas Terror
programme.desc: When a beloved couple vanishes just before their annual Christmas party, their family fears the worst – and police must do everything possible in order to solve a years-long mystery.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell hatches a plan to win over Nicki. Stuart and Phil visit Stuart's old home one last time before it is sold.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil unknowingly sleeps with a nun and must keep Nicki from finding out. Haskell and Eden take care of a fussy Holly after she suffers an injury.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly accidentally sets Haskell up with a gay man. Stuart helps Phil get over his fear of funerals.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart asks Nicki to accompany him to an important dinner. Phil and Haskell consider getting vasectomies together.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly dates an older man only to find he lives in an assisted living facility. Nicki comes to Phil with a proposition.
programme.sub-title: The Old Man and the Holly

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: In the wake of Haskell declaring his love for Nicki, Holly tries to play cupid. Stuart secretly arranges for Phil to get together with his high school crush.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly represents Nicki in her divorce, but lets her own history with marriage get in the way. Phil tries to prove he’s not getting older by dating a much younger woman.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly joins a grief support group to meet a man. Stuart and Haskell help prepare Phil for a talk show appearance after he develops a lisp.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell dates a beautiful woman who Phil is convinced is really a man. Stuart is filled with guilt after he sleeps with a woman who thinks he’s a war hero.
programme.sub-title: An Officer and a Dental Man

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell’s estranged brother shows up and asks for one small favor: his kidney. Holly mentors a teenager who turns out to like Eden’s job more than hers.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly throws a birthday party for Stuart and Nicki, but her real motive is to impress a guy she's just met who's new in town. Nicki and Stuart's dad shows up and ruins everything.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell plans to attend a big event honoring him for his past bowling glory, but is quarantined with Phil and Stuart. Holly secretly rewrites Eden's college paper and almost destroys her dream.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: The gang attends a charity silent auction. Haskell wins a police ride-along. Phil wins dinner with his favorite sitcom TV Mom. Stuart and Holly are forced to share a cooking lesson with a celebrity chef.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly sneaks into a sorority Eden is pledging to find out why she was rejected years ago. Haskell turns the guys' apartment into a pretend AirBnB to attract a woman.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Sleeping Dogs Lie
programme.desc: When Oscar and Felix make a trip to Ashley's (Christine Woods) to retrieve Felix's special pillow, a secret that he has kept from Oscar is revealed. Five-time NBA All-Star Chris Webber guest stars.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Enlightening Strikes
programme.desc: When Felix substitute teaches a yoga class, his teaching style rubs everyone, including Emily, the wrong way. Weird Al Yankovic and Regis Philbin guest star.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Jealous Island
programme.desc: Oscar becomes obsessed with living up to Murph's (Geoff Stults) standards when he finds out the girl he is seeing used to date the handsome ex-baseball player.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Audit Couple
programme.desc: When the IRS decides to audit Oscar and his ex-wife Gaby, Felix offers to mediate between the contentious exes when he realizes that he might be the reason Oscar was audited in the first place.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: All About Eavesdropping
programme.desc: After Oscar and Felix become obsessed with eavesdropping on their bickering neighbors, they try to subtly intervene and help them save their marriage.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Unger The Influence
programme.desc: With the help of Murph, Oscar decides to throw a big party when Felix finally agrees to spend the weekend away. Also, Felix and Emily have their first sleepover.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: From Here to Maturity
programme.desc: Oscar faces a personal dilemma when he dates a young nanny, Allyson (Brianne Howey) who works for his neighbor, Charlotte (Teri Hatcher).

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Madison & Son
programme.desc: Oscar's dream comes true when he is asked to throw out the first pitch at a New York Mets game.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Oscar's Overture
programme.desc: Oscar attempts to impress Charlotte (Teri Hatcher) by purchasing a table for a fundraiser to benefit The New York Philharmonic.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: An Oscar Named Desire
programme.desc: Oscar and Charlotte hit a speed bump when they hesitate to take their relationship to the next level.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Make Room For Dani
programme.desc: Oscar reluctantly agrees with his agent that it's time to shake things up on his radio show and allows Dani to have a bigger role after a rival host, Rich Eisen, taunts him.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: A Dinner Engagement
programme.desc: Felix attempts to reverse Emily's birthday curse and plans a nice dinner to celebrate with friends.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Chess Nuts
programme.desc: Oscar learns that Felix was a nationally ranked chess player as a child and convinces him to return to the game to make money.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Odd Man Out
programme.desc: Felix forces Oscar and Emily to go on a date to get to know each other better in the hope that they'll become friends.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Road Scholar
programme.desc: In an attempt to surprise Emily, Felix gets his learner's permit and enlists his friends to help him learn how to drive.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: All The Residents' Men
programme.desc: Oscar and Felix run a heated campaign for President of their building's tenants' association, but Oscar doesn't fully realize everything the position entails.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Ex-Factor
programme.desc: When Murph persuades Oscar to try online dating, Oscar finds himself on a blind date with Felix's ex-wife, Ashley (Christine Woods).

programme.title: The Odd Couple: London Calling
programme.desc: Oscar is forced to choose between his romantic plans with Charlotte (Teri Hatcher) and helping to save Felix's relationship as Emily decides to extend her stay in London.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Food Fight
programme.desc: When Oscar learns that his favorite hangout, Langford's, is in financial trouble, he impulsively asks Felix to help save it, without considering the disastrous consequences.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: I Kid, You Not
programme.desc: Oscar tries to prove to Charlotte that he can be responsible when he volunteers to take her son, Evan (Caleb Brown), trick-or-treating on Halloween.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Taffy Days
programme.desc: Oscar reconnects with many significant people from his father's life when he agrees to carry out Walter's last request to spread his ashes behind the candy factory he once owned.

programme.title: The Millers: Plot Twists
programme.desc: When Carol dictates that it's time to rearrange the family's positions in the Millers cemetery plot because of the two divorces.

programme.title: The Millers: The Mother Is In
programme.desc: When Carol finds out that Nathan is seeing a therapist, she secretly makes an appointment for herself in order to find out what's going on.

programme.title: The Millers: Giving The Bird
programme.desc: It's Halloween, and Nathan, Debbie, and Adam take Mikayla trick-or-treating to the house of an old woman who everyone in the neighborhood thinks is a witch.

programme.title: The Millers: Driving Miss Crazy
programme.desc: When Nathan gets frustrated after he's forced to drive Carol around town for errands once again, he demands that she either learn how to drive or find another chauffeur.

programme.title: The Millers: Internet Dating
programme.desc: When Nathan helps Carol set up her profile on an Internet dating site, he and Ray get so excited about one of her potential suitors, they start corresponding with him, pretending to be Carol.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 90
programme.desc: When her marriage falls apart after three months of alcohol abuse, this single mom wants Judge Rhonda to make her estranged husband pay for their divorce.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 31
programme.desc: A nearly fatal truck collision drives cousins into Judge Rhonda's Court where an accident reconstruction expert reveals forensic results.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: A woman on her last nerve drags her cheating estranged husband to Judge Rhonda's courtroom for a lesson in responsibility.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: Their fairy-tale turns grim when her godson kills houseplants she has nurtured for over fifty years and named after friends the plants outlived; Judge Rhonda tries to revive this garden massacre.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 77
programme.desc: Twin sisters and their wives bring their long festering drama over an heirloom clock into Judge Rhonda's Courtroom.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 66
programme.desc: A simple video with a "tall beer toast" went viral, generated a $2,200 payment, and brought a formerly close brother and sister to Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 40
programme.desc: Godbrothers argue over an apartment loan and a surprise secret witness turns the tables in Judge Rhonda's Courtroom.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 10
programme.desc: A husband's affair with his wife's cousin is revealed when a valuable collection is stolen from their car and Judge Rhonda settles the score.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 39
programme.desc: A 20 year old car drives the anger between one sister and the other who has suffered a traumatic brain injury; Judge Rhonda presides.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 59
programme.desc: Best friends slated to become sisters-in-law end up in Judge Rhonda's court over a car wreck after a night of heavy drinking.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 13
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda digs through the mud when cousins feud over a 4- wheeler that was shredded in the woods.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 8
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda decides if his cousin should pay for a young man's bicep augmentation surgery.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 54
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda hears the case of a convenience store stop for a drink that leaves a car in a mangled mess and the relationship between brothers-in-law on ice.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 96
programme.desc: Sisters who share a rollercoaster existance of ups and downs traded their beloved dog Mini and now that both are stable they need Judge Rhonda to decide who will provide Mini's forever home.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 74
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda faces a family in crisis over nude pictures and a mother's restraining order against her son's fiancee.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 61
programme.desc: A Mom on her last nerve with her lazy, unemployed son and his boyfriend comes to Judge Rhonda's court with a banged-up car and a plea for help.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 42
programme.desc: Cousins cross swords over a trip to the Hawaiian paradice that one claims was a long planned Birthday celebration and the other tells Judge Rhonda she received no details, so she didn't go.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 25
programme.desc: Sisters squabble over a loan to renovate a new film studio and drag their brother with them into Judge Rhonda's Court.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 20
programme.desc: Brothers face the music, actually Hip Hop Jazz from an Alto Sax, over a loan for studio gear in Judge Rhonda's Courtroom.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 73
programme.desc: A motorcycle crash drives two close cousins into Judge Rhonda's courtroom because the younger one who "just wanted to be like Joe" could not keep up.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 69
programme.desc: A model says her cousin/manager is a thought out thief and Judge Rhonda must decide if his "extra" 20% commission is justified by her demands.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Relative Justice
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda faces a family in crisis; mom and step dad claim their daughter is mentally unstable, uses drugs and steals from their company.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 30
programme.desc: Sisters who fall into financial ruin over a car purchased so one of them can visit her murdered son's grave bring the case to Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 52
programme.desc: A tattoo "addiction" has drawn out the conflict between an older woman and her estranged young husband; Judge Rhonda inks them a solution.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 6
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda navigates the dispute between an estranged step-father and a grieving son over his late mother's custom motorcycle.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 70
programme.desc: When Sassy the dog turns up missing after a night filled with old and new boyfriends, Judge Rhonda faces former sisters-inlaw growling with anger and grief.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 7
programme.desc: Sisters in crisis: Judge Rhonda helps a family fight a path through drug addiction.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 9
programme.desc: Brothers in the flooring business try to convince Judge Rhonda that cutting vinyl is harder than laying carpet.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 58
programme.desc: When her cousin got out of jail on a theft charge, she tells Judge Rhonda that the list of what he owes her for rent, a cell phone, and her wrecked car is almost as long as his rap sheet.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: Cousins who work together, put together a "Stop the Violence" event to help kids, but when that failed it started an argument that won't stop until they face Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 118
programme.desc: Cousins clash over an expensive Massage chair that was ruined because one of them was falling down drunk.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 149
programme.desc: When her younger cousin fell on hard times and needed money for a car, this woman dug into her pockets and handed over thousands of dollars which, to Judge Rhonda's surprise, was used as a down payment on a fancy luxury vehicle.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: A business woman with a thriving eyelash clientel claims her cousin has used her like a private ATM; Judge Rhonda probes both parties to see who will blink first.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 44
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda entertains a Rap Battle as a unique form of testimony in a case between cousins who have lost their harmony.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 34
programme.desc: A smoking Truck, worn out brakes and a muddy, rain slicked, dirt road drive a brother and sister straight to Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 112
programme.desc: When a cousin's ex becomes his new boyfriend, Judge Rhonda has to sort through the mess of loans, baby supplies, broken car windows, burned up pies and a cut up wig.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 18
programme.desc: Will a Cheeseburger run end an engagement? Judge Rhonda presides.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda tries to tie cousins back together who are at the end of their rope when expensive rock climbing equipment seems to fall off a cliff.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 12
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda faces a clash of biblical proportion when a Pastor claims his sister stole $5,000 from his church.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 81
programme.desc: Sisters who only found each other when they were grown up are now at war over merchandise one "grabs real quick" from the other's boutique and Judge Rhonda has to settle the tab.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 82
programme.desc: Designer sunglasses that look really "fly" divide two cousins, inseparable since birth, because they might be fake; Judge Rhonda shines sunlight on the truth.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: When a dad takes a fancy, fast car from his son's car lot to take a lady friend on a 100 mph joy ride two of them dead end in front of Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 107
programme.desc: Brothers ask Judge Rhonda for a DNA test to determine whether the man who died shielding them from gunfire was the biological father to both of them.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Chaos Theory
programme.desc: The detectives hunt for clues relating to a missing college freshman. Their hope of finding her alive diminishes as all of their leads on her turn cold.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Overload
programme.desc: A construction worker falls off a tall building but forensics determines that he died prior to the fall. Another case involves a boy who suffocates to death at his therapist's house late in the night.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Bully For You
programme.desc: When Barry Shickle is murdered in the bathroom of his school, Grissom, Catherine and Warrick investigate the case. They learn from the school counselor that Barry was a cruel bully. The victims of his bullying become the CSI's prime suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Scuba Doobie-doo
programme.desc: A scuba diver is found dead, fully equipped with an oxygen tank, on a tree in a burned forest.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Alter Boys
programme.desc: A woman is found dead at a spa while a young man is found burying dead bodies.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Caged
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a locked room while another died when her car is hit by a train.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: And Then There Were None
programme.desc: A casino is brutally robbed by four trigger-happy men wearing wigs. Painstaking identification efforts lead to ex-con serial killer Tammy Felton and accomplices, but one by one they are found murdered themselves.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Ellie
programme.desc: The investigation of the death of a petty con man and drug mule leads the CSI team to Brass' daughter Ellie.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Organ Grinder
programme.desc: When businessman Robert Fairmont is found almost dead in a hotel elevator, the CSI team assume the case. They find evidence of heavy metal poisoning. When they look for the corpse, it has been cremated and the organs donated.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: You’ve Got Male
programme.desc: When a young woman riding a horse finds a body of a woman inside a pipe in a construction site, Grissom and his team investigate the murder. Soon they find another woman's body and coroner Dr. Albert 'Al' Robbins notes that the women were sisters.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: The Finger
programme.desc: Wealthy Roy Logan acts suspiciously when withdrawing $1m cash with blood on his hands, but must be released for lack of a crime. When Catherine rushes after him with his spectacles, she gets a phone call saying Logan's lover Amanda Freeman was kidnapped.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Primum Non Nocere
programme.desc: An ice hockey player dies during a game.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Felonius Monk
programme.desc: Grissom studies Ananda's Vegas Buddhist monastery where four Thai monks were fatally shot in the forehead. Forensics also show the presence of hostile restaurant owner Peter Hutchins Sr. and his son, Pete Jr.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Chasing The Bus
programme.desc: A tour bus heading to Las Vegas skids off the highway, leading to many deaths and even more injuries. The team suspects that this was no mere accident.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Cats In The Cradle
programme.desc: An old lady is found dead with a stab wound in her chest. There are over 20 cats in her house.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Anatomy Of A Lye
programme.desc: Grissom and Sidle investigate the death of someone who was buried in a shallow grave in a park and covered in lye.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: To Halve and to Hold
programme.desc: When a single human bone is discovered in the desert, Grissom and Catherine must cover miles of territory to find the rest of the skeleton.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Table Stakes
programme.desc: At a swanky fundraiser, attended by the sheriff, a woman turns up dead in the pool.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Two Tough To Die
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from a mall parking garage. She's raped, beaten, shot and left for dead. Sara collects evidence from her and grows attached to her.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Face Lift
programme.desc: A body is found in a pottery store in what's apparently a robbery that was interrupted.

programme.title: It Takes a Killer
programme.desc: After months of investigation, cops make two discoveries that confirm an expectant mum who disappeared on Christmas Eve had been targeted for murder.

programme.title: It Takes a Killer
programme.desc: When a Southern California high school teacher suddenly dies, it appears his death was due to natural causes, but once law enforcement starts looking into his widow, they uncover her treacherous past and her preference for using poison to kill.

programme.title: It Takes a Killer
programme.desc: A dedicated mother disappears from suburban Los Angeles, leaving behind three kids and a husband she planned to divorce. Law enforcement determines she's been the victim of a homicide but it takes them nearly two decades to unravel the mystery.

programme.title: Secrets of a Murder Detective
programme.desc: Detective Inspector Steve Keogh reflects on the challenges police faced during their investigation into the 2015 murders of actress Sian Blake and her two sons by her husband, Arthur Simpson-Kent.

programme.title: Secrets of a Murder Detective
programme.desc: Detective Inspector Steve Keogh looks back at the highly nuanced investigation into the 2013 murder of 17-year-old Champion Ganda, whose fatal stabbing shocked her East London community.

programme.title: Secrets of a Murder Detective
programme.desc: Detectives Keogh and Dickie investigate the 2000 murder of Tom Cressman by his lover, Jane Andrews, a former royal dresser who went on the run before claiming in her defence that she had been in an abusive relationship.

programme.title: Secrets of a Murder Detective
programme.desc: Former detective inspector Keogh and the team investigate the murder of retired nurse Eulin Hastings, revealing how police inquiries led to the conviction of serial burglar Aaron Fyle.

programme.title: Secrets of a Murder Detective
programme.desc: Former detective Steve Keogh uncovers secrets in Terry Daddow's 1991 contract killing.

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: When Laila Rezk was discovered badly beaten in her own home, she died despite all efforts to revive her. Forensic examination eliminated all traces of fingerprints, except one.

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: When police found a man on fire, they assumed he did that to himself. His family campaigned for justice for two years and New Scotland Yard re-investigated the case.

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: When Gagandip Singh's body was discovered in a burnt-out car, detectives found out that his father was murdered on a business trip - was there a connection between both deaths?

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: When barman David Morley was beaten to death on London's South Bank, lead detective Nick Scola deduced that the attack was not what it first appeared to be.

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: When Geeta Aulakh was fatally attacked on the way to pick up her children, detectives tried to find a motive. The case took a new direction after an informant came forward.

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: When a string of elderly people were found dead in their beds across south London, New Scotland Yard detectives realised they had a serial killer on their hands.

programme.title: Murder Book
programme.desc: After a teenager is killed by a speedboat user while fishing, two Game Wardens from Texas become unlikely murder investigators.

programme.title: Murder Book
programme.desc: A veteran investigator is brought out of retirement to close the case of a policeman who was murdered.

programme.title: Murder Book
programme.desc: Investigators join forces with the family of a missing retiree in order to unravel the mystery of his disappearance. They eventually bring his killers to justice.

programme.title: Voice of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Jennifer Pan witnessed the murder of her mother and the attempted murder of her father. But when he wakes from a coma, her father has a very different story to tell.

programme.title: Voice of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: When a criminal on probation embarks on a killing spree of ex-lovers, police try to get ahead of the man who will later insist that he is a victim and that society is to blame.

programme.title: Voice of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: How do the FBI find a killer with no victim or geographic profile and who covers his trail with counter forensics. And if they can find him, how would they prove responsibility?

programme.title: Hitler's Gold: The Business Of War
programme.desc: With the help of large corporations inside and outside of Germany, Adolf Hitler conquered almost half of Europe in less than four years. Millions would be enslaved for the growth of the Nazi war machine. But in the end, what was it all for?

programme.title: Hitler's Gold: Aftermath and Injustice
programme.desc: With the end of the Second World War in Europe, the hunt for Nazi criminals started, along with the wish to bring justice to their victims, including the restitution of stolen goods, property and possessions during Hitler’s 12-year reign of terror.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: The Lost Continent (Atlantis)
programme.desc: As the Nazis rose to power, Himmler and the SS were convinced Atlantis could be found, and instigated a series of archeological expeditions seeking uncover and exploit its secrets.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: Walking with Witches
programme.desc: Convinced the medieval witch trials were a Judeo-Christian attempt to exterminate the Aryans, Himmler established a special team led by Reinhard Heydrich to build a database of medieval German witchcraft practices.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: The Quest for the Holy Grail
programme.desc: Revealing the work of a secret team of scientists and scholars established by SS leader Heinrich Himmler to scour the globe seeking the origins of the Aryan race and collect ancient artifacts.
programme.sub-title: The Quest for the Holy Grail

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: Into the Mountains (Tibet)
programme.desc: Revealing the work of a secret team of scientists and scholars established by SS leader Heinrich Himmler to scour the globe seeking the origins of the Aryan race and collect ancient artifacts.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: Cro Magnon
programme.desc: The debate about humanity's true origins becomes a nefarious fixation as SS leader Heinrich Himmler turns his attention to proving the Paleolithic past of Germany's Aryan race.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: Runes
programme.desc: Runes are the letters of an ancient Germanic writing system that harkens back to a mythological age filled with heroes, magic, and mystery.

programme.title: Hitler's Secret Sex Life: X-Rated
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler had a depraved sex life that he tried to keep hidden from the German public. He was said to be a chronic masturbator, a voyeur and that he engaged in sado-masochistic sex with women.

programme.title: Hitler's Secret Sex Life: Body Image
programme.desc: Hitler wanted the world to believe he possessed super-human qualities but in private he was a wreck. This episode reveals the archives that confirm Hitler’s genital deformity, the alarming truth about his heavy drug addiction and the Parkinson’s.

programme.title: Hitler's Secret Sex Life: Family Matters
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler's father was a violent, abusive man. His mother doted on her young son. This episode delves deep into the psychology of Hitler as the narcissistic child who grew into a malignant psychopath full of rage and deep hatred.

programme.title: Hitler's Secret Sex Life: Suicidal Maidens
programme.desc: Using extensive archival research, this program explores the squalid secrets he lied and killed to protect

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: German Bomber In Liverpool
programme.desc: Suggs and WWII militaria expert Stephen Taylor unearth artefacts from former military sites - starting with a German bomber found in Liverpool.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: WW1 Special
programme.desc: To mark 100 years since the end of the Great War, Suggs and Stephen excavate the site of a huge World War One transit camp at Morn Hill, outside Winchester.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Douglas Bader and the Duxford Fliers
programme.desc: Suggs and WWII expert Stephen hunt for souvenirs left by flying ace Douglas Bader and the legendary Duxford Fliers.
programme.sub-title: Douglas Bader and the Duxford Fliers

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Hull Blitz
programme.desc: Stephen Taylor and Suggs are up to their knees in mud in Lincolnshire as they dig up the remains of a Bolton Paul Defiant plane, shot down during the Hull Blitz.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Tank in a Vineyard
programme.desc: Suggs and Stephen continue their hunt for buried WWII treasure, and discover a tank buried in a vineyard.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Top Secret Arms Depot
programme.desc: In Weedon Bec, Suggs and Stephen unearth a wealth of WW2 relics as they uncover the very secret past of a top secret arms supply depot.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: 82nd Airborne and German POWs
programme.desc: Suggs and Stephen go in search of relics from the United States' elite 82nd airborne infantry division.
