programme.desc: Sharks, shorts and crew problems plague the fleet, but two captains get blessed with new mates while harpoon boats battle for the last fish of their season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Snitches Get Fishes
programme.desc: Midway through the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season, a long-­-running feud lands one Gloucester captain in hot water, while another boat struggles to keep their crew intact.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Opposites Distract
programme.desc: At the halfway mark of the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season some teams are working well together and killing it while others are floundering and on the verge of killing each other.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Take It to the Bank
programme.desc: The Gloucester captains face a familiar decision: whether or not to take the long, high-¬-risk journey to Georges Bank to increase their chances of a big bluefin haul.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Doubling Down
programme.desc: After a massive haul offshore on Georges Bank last week, Captain Dave Carraro of FV-¬-Tuna.com and Captain TJ Ott of Hot Tuna decide to double down and make the long trip again.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Riders in the Storm
programme.desc: When a violent storm rolls in during week eleven, the Gloucester captains face a tough decision at a critical time: do they fish... or flee?

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Comeback Kid
programme.desc: With four weeks left in the season, Hard Merchandise and FV-¬- Tuna.Com struggle to stay at the top of the fleet as an unexpected adversary, the Wicked Pissah.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Tuna Invaders
programme.desc: With only three weeks left, the North Atlantic captains face more competition than ever as boats from all over head to Gloucester and battle for those last bluefin of the season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Thin Bluefin Line
programme.desc: There is a narrow margin separating the top four boats and only two weeks left in the season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Final Fishdown
programme.desc: In the last week of the Atlantic bluefin tuna season, the closest race in Wicked Tuna history is a tossup among four top contenders.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Bite is On
programme.desc: Meet the fleet, as peak season begins and the adrenaline rush of \\"monstah\\" hunting hits Gloucester.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Payback's a Fish
programme.desc: After going bust on his last trip and coming home empty-handed, Marciano of Hard Merchandise now wrestles with the trials of being a husband and father who has to be away from home so often.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Weekend Warriors
programme.desc: Tuna.com continues its winning streak, catching two fish in one day while the rest of the fleet struggles to even find a spot to fish in between the weekend recreational boaters.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Size Matters
programme.desc: Meet Kevin and the Christina, a boat that gets its own real-life fish story when it snags an 1,100-pound \\"monstah\\" right out of the gate.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Greed, Ego & Jealousy
programme.desc: After watching the Christina catch the biggest tuna of the season, the uber-competitive Captain Dave of the Tuna.com is obsessed with beating the record, and catching a fish bigger than 1,075 lbs!

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Mann gegen Sturm
programme.desc: Marciano, captain of Hard Merchandise, risks the elements to hook a giant bluefin and finds himself with boat trouble in the midst of the storm.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Robert Hendy-Freegard – The Terrorist Trickster
programme.desc: Dubbed “The Most Evil Conman Ever” by the British press, Hendy-Freegard terrorized victims into believing they were terrorist targets.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Lust
programme.desc: One morning in the stairwell of a Toronto building, a guard makes a grotesque discovery: the dead body of a Filipina nanny. It's clear she's been savagely murdered and raped.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Angel of Death
programme.desc: An angel of mercy turns out to be an angel of death when the number of deaths in an Indiana Intensive Care Unit skyrockets. One astute nurse believes there must be more to this than just natural causes.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Fat Bandit
programme.desc: A string of bank robberies in Winnipeg confound local police. Most bank-robbers are addicts, usually quite thin. This new man doesn't fit the profile: this bandit is fat.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Pointing to Murder
programme.desc: A withered corpse is found half-buried in a field beside a theme park. Too decayed to identify properly, detectives have only the leathery fingers of one hand to work from.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: In 1998, in a normally peaceful suburb, a pervert on a bicycle appears, performing sexual acts on himself and then attacking teenage girls. For reasons apparent to the residents, they nickname him after the Scottish Loch Ness monster.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Monster of Miramichi
programme.desc: Firemen are called to a blaze and discover two sisters, one dead and the other on death's door. Detectives learn that a man snuck in and brutally sexually assaulted the sisters before setting fire to the house.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Hostage
programme.desc: A man robs an armoured car at gunpoint and holds a massage parlor worker hostage. As police investigate, they find startling links to a series of robberies, all taking place during the Christmas season.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Danger in the Woods
programme.desc: Three teenagers accompany a deliveryman to a densely wooded area for a drinking party that, before long, becomes a nightmare. Things take a terrifying turn when one of teens attacks the others.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Hijacked
programme.desc: In 1971, before the era of airport security, a Black Panther hijacks a plane to Havana, Cuba. A thirty-year old cold case is finally solved in 2002 by a fluke of modern technology.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Flying Bandit
programme.desc: In 1986, an American becomes one of Canada’s most prolific bank and jewellery bandits after he pulls off one of the biggest heists in Canadian history. As more robberies occur, the police become more determined to catch the mastermind behind them all.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: Death in Store
programme.desc: A robbery and double homicide at a grocery store in Raleigh, North Carolina shocks the community. With little evidence left behind, and no eyewitnesses, the investigation stalls.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: Pride and Joy
programme.desc: Pride and Joy focuses on Eric Napoletano who brutally murdered his victims, including his wife Myra. Napoletano eluded the law from New York to Albuquerque, New Mexico before he was finally arrested on March 27, 1991.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: Release Me
programme.desc: Release Me chronicles the story of Texas killer Kenneth Allen McDuff who received the death sentence in 1966 for a murderous rampage that left three teen-agers dead. He was paroled years later only to kill again.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: Flames of Rage
programme.desc: When firefighters in suburban Indianapolis are called to a house fire, what they find inside shocks the entire community, a respected minister and his wife have been murdered with an ax.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: The Missing Heiress
programme.desc: In February of 1977, Helen Vorhees Brach walked out of the famed Mayo Clinic in Minnesota, and into the pages of Chicago folklore. The wealthy widowed heiress of the Brach Candy fortune was never seen again.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: Career Criminal
programme.desc: A loving mother disappears without explanation in Arlington, Texas. Investigators suspect foul play but search fruitlessly for any sign of her whereabouts.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: An Unlikely Suspect
programme.desc: The community of Dover, Delaware is shocked when human body parts turn up throughout the city. Authorities determine that the remains are all from the same victim, but it will take the best forensic scientists in the country to make a positive ID..

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: Deadly Medicine
programme.desc: When the death rate at a rural Indiana hospital skyrockets, an investigation implicates a nurse, Orville Lynn Majors. State Police are left with a daunting task.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: Silent Partner
programme.desc: Roy Radin was a successful New York theatrical producer with a knack for making money and a taste for the high life. His hopes for making it as a Hollywood producer ended abruptly in a remote canyon outside of Los Angeles.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: The Desperate Crossing
programme.desc: A quadriplegic woman loved by her community is found dead in an Orlando park 150ft from her motorized wheelchair. Children find her lifeless body face down in the sand.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Derailed
programme.desc: A train passenger behaves oddly en route to Arizona and then disappears. The next day his bloodied body is found in Texas. Dr. G attempts to piece together this bizarre tragedy.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Whispered Warnings
programme.desc: A woman fears the worst when her aunt stops answering her calls. When her greatest fear is confirmed, Dr. G must determine one thing: was this a fatal fall?

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Arbitrary Assassins
programme.desc: In November 1996, Raymond Collin went missing in his hometown of Timmins, Ontario. The discovery of his body days later in a snow-covered truck led police to an assortment of possible suspects.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Slave Master
programme.desc: Several women went missing from the Kansas City area in the 1980s and 1990s.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Silent Sniper
programme.desc: In March 1992 Claude Hawkins was shot dead while he was fishing in Ohio. Hawkins' murder mirrored multiple deaths in other nearby counties.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Elusive Rapist
programme.desc: In the winter of 1968, the prairie city of Saskatoon is ravaged by a string of savage rapes.

programme.title: Crime Stories: Terror by Text
programme.desc: On a wintry morning in Sweden, Alexandra Fossmo, wife of pastor Helge Fossmo, was found shot to death in her bed.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Human Hunter
programme.desc: Robert C. Hansen was known for his hunting abilities. In the early 1980s, however, his taste for hunting took a sinister turn.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Menthol Murderer
programme.desc: A week-long search for a missing 10-yr-old Indiana girl ends sadly with her body being discovered in a nearby stream.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Abducted Atheists
programme.desc: American Atheist Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her family vanished in August 1995, leaving behind an ominous note.

programme.title: Crime Stories: Ronald Glenn West: The 22 Caliber Killer
programme.desc: When two suburban housewives are killed in their homes within a week of each other in May 1970, it leaves Toronto in fear.
programme.sub-title: Ronald Glenn West: The 22 Caliber Killer

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Doctor of Death
programme.desc: When emergency services arrived at the office of respected neurologist Richard Boggs following the report of a patient's death, they had their suspicions regarding the circumstances...

programme.title: Crime Stories: Douglas Robert Worth: The Pictou Sadist
programme.desc: On December 11, 1987 a hard luck child living in a group home in Ontario was reported missing when she failed to return home from school.
programme.sub-title: Douglas Robert Worth: The Pictou Sadist

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Homocidal Drifter
programme.desc: In the city of Moncton, New Brunswick police discover the bodies of Joan Hicks and her 11-year-old daughter, Nina ‚Äì both brutally murdered late in the night.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Bedroom Strangler
programme.desc: Women are being attacked in their beds at night. Police are baffled as to how this intruder is gaining access to apartments sometimes more than 15 stories up.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Casebook Rapist
programme.desc: An international student is found raped and murdered in the bathroom of her high-rise apartment.

programme.title: Crime Stories: David Shearing: The Wells Grey Gunman
programme.desc: In August of 1982, six members of the Bentley/Johnson family disappear in the Wells Grey National Park without a trace.
programme.sub-title: David Shearing: The Wells Grey Gunman

programme.title: World’s Most Evil Killers: Jeffrey Dahmer
programme.desc: Jeffrey Dahmer is one of the most notorious killers in the world. For thirteen years he raped, murdered and ate his young male victims — seventeen of them in total.

programme.title: World’s Most Evil Killers: Joanne Dennehy
programme.desc: Joanne Dennehy violently stabbed three men to death in March 2013. She killed for her own entertainment and has been diagnosed as a psychotic sadomasochist.

programme.title: World’s Most Evil Killers: Marc Dutroux
programme.desc: Marc Dutroux kidnapped, tortured and sexually abused six girls between 1995 and 1996, and he murdered four of them.

programme.title: Surviving Evil: Coke-crazed Killer
programme.desc: After murdering his wife, Raoul Garza is on a cocaine-fuelled rampage in a small Texas border town. And he finds his next victim just down the street - a hardworking single mother determined to save her kids even if it means sacrificing her own life.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors: Episode 6
programme.desc: Two treated patients return seeking more urgent help from the hard-pressed doctors.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: A man needs epilepsy medication but will not break his fast.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: An accident victim is unaware he may have a broken neck.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors: Episode 9
programme.desc: A young couple need confirmation that they are expecting.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 9
programme.desc: A woman has a life-threatening allergic reaction to nuts. A man has an arm injury.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 6
programme.desc: Dr Julian Humphrey awaits one patient with a rare and dangerous aortic dissection.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 4
programme.desc: Physiotherapist helps 90-year-old Audrey who bashed her head in the hospital restaurant.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 4
programme.desc: Treatment for a broken leg and a neurological disease.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 2
programme.desc: The biker cops continue their crack down on some of the busiest roads in the UK. Other motorcycle units are clearing some of the country’s most iconic scenic routes after too many thrills and spills.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 2
programme.desc: In the second of twelve episodes, our Biker Cops and Paramedics scythe through the most congested traffic in Europe, to get help where it’s most needed fast! In Birmingham, Biker Paramedic Steve Cooper battles to save a heroin addict after an overdose.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 5
programme.desc: Biker paramedic Mark Hayes has to deal with an aggressivedrunk in the city centre and a young woman with epilepsy who's had several seizures. Biker cops in Essex are on a special night op hunting illegal road users.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 6
programme.desc: In the final show of this run, Birmingham biker paramedics Steve Harris and Mark Hayes race to bring a man back to life. Essex biker cops crack down on death-trap wheels and a learner driver gets more than she expected.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 2
programme.desc: New doc Jake's first patient has fallen down the stairs.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 12
programme.desc: As a heatwave hits Yorkshire, the patient numbers rise with the temperature.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 9
programme.desc: Nurse Practitioner Dave tries to get to the bottom of why June's tongue has turned black!

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 5
programme.desc: The hospital is two porters down, marking a big problem for Sister Jane.

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red
programme.desc: A man fights for his life after suffering a cardiac arrest; a crash leaves a man trapped.

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red: Episode 4
programme.desc: A motorcyclist is thrown head first from his bike.

programme.title: Helicopter ER: Cattle Attack
programme.desc: A man is trapped under a tractor that has plunged off a bridge and is in danger of sinking. The chopper lands on a farm to save a farmer who's been attacked by his own cattle. A deer runs out in front of a biker and leaves him with serious injuries.

programme.title: Helicopter ER: Always Look Both Ways
programme.desc: The flying doctors and paramedics of the Yorkshire Air Ambulance are called into action when a train collides with a car at a level crossing, and the race is on to save a toddler who has fallen from an upstairs window.

programme.title: Scorpion: A Christmas Car-Roll
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, when Walter chooses work over spending quality time with his friends, he falls down the stairs and hits his head, and as he lays unconscious, he enters a dream world where Team Scorpion never existed.

programme.title: Scorpion: The Bunker Games
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must work with Toby's nemesis, Quincy Berkstead and his wife, Amy , when they are locked inside an artificially intelligent doomsday bunker that aims to kill them.

programme.title: Scorpion: Lighthouse of the Rising Sun
programme.desc: A solar storm knocks out power in Los Angeles, and Team Scorpion must help a teen pilot and his girlfriend who are lost over the Pacific without navigation or radio contact.

programme.title: Scorpion: Wave Goodbye
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must prevent an incoming tsunami from hitting a vulnerable nuclear power facility, and Toby secretly helps his ex-fiancée retrieve her stolen identity.

programme.title: Scorpion: Nerd, Wind and Fire
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day, Team Scorpion must set aside their romantic plans to help a doctor and pilot trapped inside a helicopter that crashed atop a skyscraper.

programme.title: Scorpion: Dumbster Fire
programme.desc: The geniuses of Team Scorpion turn into knuckleheads and Paige must simplify the science for them, when their mental faculties are impaired during a job to prevent the creation of a black hole.

programme.title: Scorpion: Dork Day Afternoon
programme.desc: Team Scorpion inadvertently crashes a bank robbery in progress and is taken hostage. Also, Sylvester's feelings for Florence grow.

programme.title: Scorpion: Gator Done
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to the bayou to track down a cagey alligator in order to stop a deadly mosquito-borne virus, and Paige teaches Walter the concept of the 'white lie.'

programme.title: Scorpion: Foul Balls
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must use their high IQs to win a softball game when the homeland director challenges, with all of their future government contracts on the line.

programme.title: Scorpion: Kenny and the Jet
programme.desc: Paige's maternal side goes into high gear when Team Scorpion must save an unconscious, a hypothermic boy stuck in the wheel well of their airborne airplane.

programme.title: Scorpion: A Lie in the Sand
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to Northeast Africa where they must carefully navigate a minefield in order to save the lives of local villagers.

programme.title: Scorpion: Pilot
programme.desc: When a crisis at LAX leaves dozens of airplanes unable to land, the government enlists a team of misfit geniuses to save the day.

programme.title: Scorpion: Single Point of Failure
programme.desc: The Governor calls on Team Scorpion when his daughter is mysteriously "bio-hacked" with a deadly virus and has only 24 hours to live.

programme.title: Scorpion: A Cyclone
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is determined to prove their worth when a bomber threatens to take out the internet infrastructure of the entire Southwest.

programme.title: Scorpion: Shorthanded
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to Las Vegas for a simple casino job, but a robbery leads to Walter's arrest and the rest of the team is left to clear his name.

programme.title: Scorpion: Plutonium Is Forever
programme.desc: To fix a Los Angeles nuclear reactor that's on the verge of a cataclysmic meltdown, Walter and the team must reluctantly enlist the help of a troubled former member.

programme.title: Scorpion: True Colors
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must pass a mandated psych evaluation or face being disbanded after they're accused of destroying a priceless work of art in an attempt to protect an art exhibit.

programme.title: Scorpion: Father's Day
programme.desc: A case gets personal for Team Scorpion when three convicts break out of prison and one of them is a brilliant hacker who was forced to help the others steal billions online.

programme.title: Scorpion: Risky Business
programme.desc: Team Scorpion enlists the help of a musician who created a controversial algorithm that generates hit songs to help find the murderer of a music blogger.

programme.title: Scorpion: Rogue Element
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must help protect Cabe's ex-wife after she uncovers evidence that suggests foul play in the death of a prominent congressman.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Each One Fights…
programme.desc: Megatron commands Shockblast to lead an assault on Cybertron to take out the Energon towers, and allow Unicron to “feed” on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Unicron Unleashed
programme.desc: Megatron uses the Energon to revive Tidal Wave into Mirage.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Open Fire
programme.desc: As the Autobots fought their way to Megatron within Unicron's body and with Megatron throwing everything at them, Alpha Q provides support by fighting for the control of Unicron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Ripped Up Space
programme.desc: Limping to join with the rest of the Autobots, Optimus Prime is confronted by Shockblast, who plans to take out Optimus Prime to prove that he is superior to Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Team Optimus Prime
programme.desc: Megatron escapes into a black hole and Optimus Prime decides to give chase, even though he doesn’t know what he will find on the other side. Kicker joins his Autobot friends on their mission and pilots the Miranda II into the black hole.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Protection
programme.desc: On the other side of the rip, the Autobots must now defend a whole new set of planets, and Wing Saber finally gets the chance to re-capture his prisoner Shockblast.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Imprisoned Inferno
programme.desc: Shockblast has been captured and temporarily imprisoned on Iron Planet. Inferno is left to stand guard over Shockblast while the other Autobots are on Jungle Planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: Team Bulkhead searches for the Autobots, while Kicker and Ironhide search for Inferno on the Jungle Planet. Inferno, who was previously affected by the Decepticons into embracing the dark side, is saved by Kicker after learning of a Decepticon attack.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Bulkhead
programme.desc: The Autobots go to put up an Energon tower on Jungle planet, but Megatron isn't going to let that happen without a fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Farewell Inferno
programme.desc: Inferno uses his Decepticon “half” to bait Megatron. In the end, Inferno sacrifices himself in the sun to defeat the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Crash Course
programme.desc: The Autobots have spare time so Rodimus authorizes a race for the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Omega Supreme
programme.desc: Omega Supreme first appearance. Autobots finally find Unicron. Inferno is repaired into Roadblock.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: A Heroic Battle
programme.desc: Unicron gets his head back. Alpha Q dies in the process.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: The Power
programme.desc: The Autobots find a weak spot in Unicron's armor. Meanwhile, some very interesting transformations are taking place on the Decepticon team…

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Optimus Supreme
programme.desc: The Ice planet was destroyed by Unicron. All autobots can't save it and almost all of them got wounded from Unicron's attack.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Unicron Perishes
programme.desc: Unicron dies but Megatron survives with Unicron's mind living inside him.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Ambition
programme.desc: The Decepticons, Megatron, Starscream, and Scorponok attack Cybertron. Optimus Prime and the other Autobots, aboard the Miranda II, travelled to Cybertron to save the planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Wishes
programme.desc: Using Unicron, Megatron has discovered a powerful source of energy: Super Energon. By immersing himself in the liquid, he is transformed into Galvatron, with a new purple armor which makes him impervious to all forms of firepower.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Galvatron!
programme.desc: Galvatron has Sixshot start moving Cybertron towards the planet where Alpha Q's “soul” is. The Miranda II gets hit and crashes into Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Break Through
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the other Autobots try to break through the energon grid and then later have to go underground

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Distribution
programme.desc: The Autobots battle, but this time in cyberspace, a virtual training program. While Alpha Q watches from the sidelines, Six Shot hacks into the program and enables the Decepticons to play in the game.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: The Omega Train
programme.desc: As the Autobots split up, they join with other rebels to find and free the Kickers family and Cybertron. Galvatron gets Cybertron through the space bridge.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Decepticon Army
programme.desc: Kicker searches for his family below Cybertron, while Galvatron and a damaged Optimus square off on the planet's surface. Kicker is reunited with his mother and sister.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Ironhide Team
programme.desc: Kicker's dad sabotages the energon gas grid from within enabling Optimus to get into the Command Center and Rodimus and Prowl waiting around Cybertron to get to the planet. When the Terrorcons entered the super energon, their size grew.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Formidable
programme.desc: Primus is still snoozing. When Sixshot overloads the grid, a huge explosion destroys almost all the autobots. Cybertron heads for Plains planet and destroys all the planets in its path.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Galvatron Terror
programme.desc: Sixshot convinces Mirage, Snow Cat, and Demolisher that Starscream will stay Galvatron's favorite if they do not do something about it, but when they head out Sixshot traps them and heads for the Superenergon.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Destructive Power
programme.desc: Galvatron is growing and tethered to Cybertron by strands of Superenergon. Kicker and some Omnicons cut the strands. Ironhide and Scorponok battle, and Galvatron heads into space, but not towards Alpha Q's planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Spark
programme.desc: Big Galvatron vs. Big Optimus Prime. Lots of little battles with all the others too. Kicker gets sappy with Misha before going to destroy Unicron's “puny” remains, but something's not quite right…

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: The Sun
programme.desc: Unicron is the “force that drives the universe” and Primus uses the super energon, the autobots band together and give their combination sparks to Optimus, Galvatron wakes/becomes Unicron again.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Darkness Rising: Part 1
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the Autobots investigate the return of the Decepticons while forced to account for a group of young humans who unwittingly become involved in their eons-old conflict.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Darkness Rising: Part 2
programme.desc: When a weak life signal is received from Cliffjumper, the Autobots roll out and are met by newly-returned Megatron who has obtained a mysterious and powerful substance... Dark Energon!

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Darkness Rising: Part 3
programme.desc: Bulkhead is on a mission to rescue Agent Fowler, who has been kidnapped by the Decepticons. Complications arise when Miko secretly tags along.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Darkness Rising: Part 4
programme.desc: Utilizing the Dark Energon, Megatron summons an army of undead warriors to battle Optimus, while the other Autobots launch a high-stakes rescue onboard the Decepticon warship.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Darkness Rising: Part 5
programme.desc: The ultimate showdown unfolds in Earth's orbit as the Decepticons, aided by Megatron's undead army, do battle with the Autobots with the fate of the Earth hanging in the balance.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Masters and Students
programme.desc: While Optimus Prime and Bumblebee square off against Skyquake, Starscream encounters challenges to his leadership at every turn.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Scrapheap
programme.desc: Bulkhead, Bumblebee and Ratchet scramble to eliminate a swarm of Scraplets that have invaded Autobot base while Optimus and Arcee patrol in the Arctic.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Con Job
programme.desc: Bulkhead eagerly anticipates a visit from his old friend Wheeljack, but when his buddy arrives, things are not as they seem.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Convoy
programme.desc: The Autobots assist Agent Fowler in transporting a hazardous explosive device, but this time they come under attack from more than just the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Deus Ex Machina
programme.desc: Miko and Bulkhead head to Greece on a field trip to recover an Energon Harvester; unfortunately, class is also in session for new Decepticons Knock Out and Breakdown.

programme.title: Survivorman: Survivorman & Son Ecuador
programme.desc: Father and son embark on a photography expedition deep in the Ecuadorian jungle but when the tour guide doesn't return, Les and Logan must put their wills of survival to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Survivorman: Texas/Utah
programme.desc: Les tracks Sasquatch from East Texas to rural Utah in an effort to elicit an encounter.

programme.title: Survivorman: Argentina
programme.desc: Les Stroud travels to the Mitre Peninsula, a remote peninsula located on the easternmost tip of Isla Grande in the province of Tierra del Fuego, Argentina.

programme.title: Survivorman: Nevada
programme.desc: Les simulates a trail runner becoming lost in the woods for 24 hours.

programme.title: Survivorman: Hunting in Temagami
programme.desc: After all his years of wilderness survival, the forests of Ontario's Temagami still rank as some of the most difficult, harrowing and challenging survival experiences Les has ever faced.

programme.title: Survivorman: Fighting To Survive
programme.desc: Les Stroud, TV's Survivorman, will teach Elias the ways of survival. However, he won't teach him everything he needs to know.

programme.title: Survivorman: Incan O'ero High Priests
programme.desc: Les and crew climb to 16,000 ft up dangerous Mt. Sinkara to join 80,000 indigenous Andeans as they make their yearly pilgrimage to the holy site of Qollorit'i.

programme.title: Survivorman: Survivorman & Son Tofino
programme.desc: Les and his 16-year-old son Logan find themselves trapped without supplies and without a way home while sea kayaking along the coastline of British Columbia.

programme.title: Survivorman: Tonga
programme.desc: Les strands himself on a deserted island in the archipelago of Tonga with a long-time friend to relive the story of marooned sailors.

programme.title: Survivorman: Canadian Rockies
programme.desc: Les is air dropped onto a snow covered peak in the Canadian Rockies. He has with him only a few readily salvageable items, among them a broken camcorder and tripod.

programme.title: Survivorman: Costa Rica
programme.desc: Marooned on Costa Rica's Osa Peninsula, Les "Survivorman" Stroud has only a few items to aid him for the next 7 days: swimming goggles, 3 ballpoint pens, a multi-tool and the clothing on his back.

programme.title: Survivorman: Australian Outback
programme.desc: Forced to land his ultralight aircraft due to a miscalculation in fuel, Survivorman is once again out to endure the elements for seven days in this spectacular locale… the Australia Outback.

programme.title: Survivorman: The Lost Pilot Winter
programme.desc: Les Stroud's first time surviving for the cameras in the dead of winter. Les ventures to remote Northern Ontario to endure temperatures of -40 degrees F for a week alone.

programme.title: Survivorman: Survivorman & Son Mongolia
programme.desc: Les returns to Mongolia after surviving a near-fatal car crash the year before with his son Logan, a recent cancer survivor.

programme.title: Survivorman: Arizona Desert
programme.desc: Riding a dirt bike out into the official middle of nowhere, Les simulates a break-down scenario. Half a gallon of water, a snack bar and his multi-tool are all he has with him for the next 7 days.

programme.title: Survivorman: Peru Amazonian Shamans
programme.desc: Les will participate with the Huacharia Tribe as they perform ceremony in their daily lives to pay homage to the elements.

programme.title: Survivorman: Patagonia
programme.desc: Survivorman has always been to teach the right way, the safe way, to instruct outdoor enthusiasts on when not to take chances and not go over the top, to avoid landing themselves in peril.

programme.title: Survivorman: Dangers
programme.desc: Les Stroud packs 25 years of survival knowledge into one 45- minute crash course in this fast-paced new compilation.

programme.title: Survivorman: Canadian Arctic
programme.desc: Les has been equipped with a bare minimum of raw materials to aid him for the next 7 days; a hunk of uncooked seal liver, some oil-rich blubber for heat, a seal hook, three matches, and a knife.

programme.title: Survivorman: The Hidden World
programme.desc: Les plants himself in Bigfoot hot spots across North America, collecting stories and experiences from Bigfoot believers, gathering and examining evidence to debunk the mysteries that surround this ancient legend.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: July Fourth weekend leads to tragedy for a California family. To catch a killer, detectives utilise an unorthodox technique - analysing bug fragments - to help put a murderer behind bars.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A family mourns the unexpected death of a beloved grandmother at Christmas. While local police assure everyone that she was a victim of a tragic accident and that there is no foul play, some things about the scene just don't add up.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a true crime hobbyist connects a Utah Jane Doe to an Ohio missing persons case, detectives are hard-pressed to solve the decades-old murder.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A young Colorado mother suddenly vanishes on Thanksgiving Day. When police trace her cell phone, it leads them to a surprising character with an even more surprising story.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Eight days after she had disappeared on her way to a family ski trip, an 18-year-old young woman's partially nude body is found floating in a river in Wyoming, Years later, DNA technology uncovers dark secrets that led to her demise.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When the 20-year-old clerk of an Atlanta-area smoke shop is gunned down during a robbery, investigators have only descriptions of the killers and the make of their getaway car; investigators use a videotaped confession to smoke out the killers.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: California police are baffled when an innocent man's DNA is found at the scene of a deadly home invasion, and authorities team with the man's defence attorney.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: This episode investigates the shooting of 15-year-old Trey Cooley, who died from a mysterious gunshot wound to the head while he sat in the lobby of his father's gun club.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In 1976, 180 war veterans in Philadelphia were hospitalised with pneumonia-like symptoms and 29 died. The disease resurfaces every few years.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators study a family in South Dakota whose son, a vegetarian, hasn't become sick. The US Department of Agriculture steps in to review the use of thyroid hormones in meat.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: This is the story of an 11-year-old boy, who almost died after eating a badly cooked burger teeming with E-Coli, and the Medical Detectives who saved his life.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Florida police search for a serial rapist and murderer who left small red fibres on each of his victims.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When an English couple goes missing, police who suspect their son has killed them must rely on mud and blood forensics to find their bodies.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Experts attempt to discover the source of heavy fog on Highway I-75 in Tennessee, which caused a 99-car accident and 12 deaths.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a woman goes missing from her home, police focus on her husband when an airline luggage tag points to an affair and murder.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: You may be too scared to listen to your radio after watching this episode, as a man poisons his neighbour for having the volume up too loud.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Handwriting and simple doodles turn an attempted murder bombing case into something very different in a peaceful British farming village.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When dozens of infants develop serious breathing problems in the Cleveland area, doctors and investigators search high and low for the cause.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a Vancouver custodian finds a burnt body in a skip, investigators determine the identity of the body and the attacker.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A woman poisoned her husband and others but was caught when an algicide enabled the police to prove her guilt.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Evidence reveals a teacher who complained of being stalked and harassed by another teacher was scamming police.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A man kills two people with bombs in an effort to get investors off his back and is sentenced to life with no chance of parole.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A man arrested for the sexual assault and attempted murder of a boy in a European country is linked to a murder in Zurich, Switzerland.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Heavy rains and snow runoff carry manure into Milwaukee's water supply, making 400,000 people ill.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Police find similar circumstances when a couple whose daughter disappeared report their second daughter missing.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic scientists provide authorities with evidence that a death deemed accidental 20 years ago was actually murder.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A series of prostitutes, murdered near Sacramento, California, were gagged and molested, their clothes cut in random patterns and their hair cut off.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators used obscure evidence to find the person responsible for killing justice officials with mail bombs.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: How a biochemistry and molecular biology professor's evidence exonerated a woman convicted of murdering her infant.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: After a young woman goes missing on the way to the train station, investigators use a strand of hair and a bloody pillowcase to identify a suspect.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A speck of bicycle paint and a speck of nickel left over from a collision with a twice-convicted child molester's car provide critical clues in the murder of a 9-year-old.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A 2-year-old boy's brain seizures and breathing problems baffle doctors until they learn the mother exhibits signs of Munchausen syndrome by proxy, a rare condition that led her to physically abuse her son and contributed to her daughter's death.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A church member is gunned down after leaving choir practice; witnesses see little and evidence is scarce, but investigators learn that she had been having affairs for years.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working in his garage and his death is initially ruled an accident until a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A husband saves his wife and child from a burning trailer, but one month later his wife is killed in her sleep, and all evidence leads to the husband.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A man is found dead of an apparent suicide. But soon after, information emerges which reveals a much more menacing scenario.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Best Of
programme.desc: This season Mega Builders Vl will take viewers back to some of the most amazing engineering projects we’ve ever covered over the past five seasons to see them reach completion after years of hard work.

programme.title: Giant Constructions: Suspension Bridges
programme.desc: Suspension bridges – impressively wide and stretched high over supporting cables or stay cables. The landscape-shaping icons: The superlative Golden Gate, Akashi Kaikyo, Aizaih, El Baluarte and Russky Bridge.

programme.title: Giant Constructions: Road Bridges
programme.desc: Road bridges: gigantic constructions of modern road traffic. Europa and Ganter Bridge, Öresund bridge, Sunshine Skyway and Viaduct de Millau.

programme.title: Giant Constructions: Steel Bridges
programme.desc: Steel bridges are extremely durable and multifunctional, fascinating not only due to its gigantic size but also because of the army of workers keeping the bridges in shape: whether on the historical landmark in Sydney or ultramodern mega bridges in China.

programme.title: Giant Constructions: Moving Bridges
programme.desc: Moving Bridges: Exotic milestones on moveable infrastructure. Historically significant: the Kaiser Wilhelm Bridge and the Michigan Avenue bridge. Mechanically unique: the Pont Jacques, the Gateshead Millennium Bridge or the Scale Lane Bridge.

programme.title: Giant Constructions: Railway Bridges
programme.desc: Railway bridges fascinate through different construction methods from masonry, truss-beam bridges to steel-concrete arch bridge. Heavier loads, faster speeds, more frequently: trains speed over bridges and the maintenance teams face ever larger challenges

programme.title: Mega Builders: Ice Hotel
programme.desc: Building the world's largest structure of snow and ice is a mega challenge of towering proportions. Anything can go wrong. And often it does.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Sinking Wings
programme.desc: The goal is to turn the coastal waters off southern British Columbia in Canada into the wreck-diving capital of the world by sinking massive objects, wait a few years for the fish to move in, and the corals to grow.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Glitz City
programme.desc: In Las Vegas -- the quintessential city of razzle-dazzle and bling -- MGM is going for the ultimate one-upmanship.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Floating Bridge
programme.desc: Engineers had no choice. They had to build a "floating bridge" in Kelowna, British Columbia. Lake Okanagan was too deep and too muddy to sink columns to support a standard bridge.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Raising the Roof
programme.desc: A new iconic stadium rises in Rio De Janeiro. The futuristic Joao Havelange Olympic Stadium will be the main venue for the 2007 Pan Am Games.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Extreme Surf Machine
programme.desc: Although Christoph Kiessling is now running “the best waterpark in the world” with the world’s largest artificial wave - it’s still not enough. This megalomaniac millionaire is always dreaming of bigger and better things.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Spanning the Saigon River
programme.desc: In Ho Chi Minh City (formerly known as Saigon), engineers are on a mission to modernize. Construction is underway to raise Phu My Bridge, a brand-new $100 million cable-stayed bridge.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: Rungis Food Market
programme.desc: Rungis International Market is the world's largest wholesale market for fresh produce. Fish, meat, fruits, vegetables, cheese and even fresh flowers are sold here every day in quantities so large an entire train station.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: Shinjuku Station
programme.desc: A look behind the scenes of the world’s busiest station: Shinjuku Station! Five separate train lines, almost three thousand passengers per minute and trains arriving every second.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: Munich Airport
programme.desc: The Munich based Franz Joseph Strauss Airport is rated the only 5-Star airport in Europe. And it is also one of Europe´s biggest hubs. An average 1.100 flights have to be taken care of every day, 44.6 million passengers chose Munich as destination.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: UPS Worldport
programme.desc: What does it take to deliver millions of packages and documents every day right in time? You need a Giant Hub: UPS Worldport in Louisville is a technological marvel. It is the largest automated package handling facility in the world.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: Moscow Metro
programme.desc: It is one of the biggest and busiest metro systems in the world: The Moscow Metro. During rush hour the trains are running every 90 seconds to transport around 9 million people daily – that makes 2.3 billion a year.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Bitterroot
programme.desc: Opening day of big game season is busy for Montana's Game Wardens. Follow along as they patrol the Bitterroot game area. Plus, the wardens set up a sting to catch poachers, complete with a moving decoy.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation H2O
programme.desc: When your job is protecting our most precious natural resources in some of the nation's most remote areas, there is rarely a dull moment. Wardens chronicles the lives of Conservation Officers in America.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Warm Springs
programme.desc: When your job is protecting our most precious natural resources in some of the nation's most remote areas, there is rarely a dull moment. Wardens chronicles the lives of Conservation Officers in America.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Moonshine
programme.desc: Montana game wardens attempt to track down suspects of illegally killed animals. Plus, one wardens get the opportunity to take a break from enforcing hunting laws to actually go on a mule deer hunt for himself.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Big Horn
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered where confiscated trophy animals end up? Today we'll show you. Follow game wardens as they monitor hunting activity on big horn sheep. Flathead Lake is overflowing with holiday cheer during the 4th of July. Let's keep it safe.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Rogers Pass
programme.desc: Montana Game Warden Bryan Golie helps out when a hunter is injured while in the woods. Elsewhere, Wardens chase down hunters that don't stop at their check station; with surprising results.

programme.desc: A reality show on real alcohol and drug testing performed on Australian roads by the Police's RBT Squad.

programme.title: Behind Bars The Worlds Toughest Prisons: San Pedro Prison, La Paz, Bolivia
programme.desc: Imagine a prison so fierce that guards stay outside for fear of their lives. Inside, the prisoners are in control: murderers, violent offenders, drug bosses. The inmates rule and anarchy prevails. Only the strongest survive this lawless place.
programme.sub-title: San Pedro Prison, La Paz, Bolivia

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Manchester
programme.desc: One of Manchester's most infamous gangs was “The Quality Street Gang”. The gang was well known for sending the Krays 'packing' from Manchester when the infamous brothers tried to expand their operation Northwards.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Birmingham
programme.desc: Examining the notorious Peaky Blinders, the flourishing gang culture in the sixties with links to the Krays, and how this culture continues today.

programme.title: Cops Uncut UK: Episode 7
programme.desc: With candid dashboard camera footage of bungled arrests, kamikaze crooks and cop-based carnage of all shapes and sizes, Cops Uncut is the ultimate American police trooper blooper reel.

programme.title: Cops Uncut UK: Episode 8
programme.desc: With candid dashboard camera footage of bungled arrests, kamikaze crooks and cop-based carnage of all shapes and sizes, Cops Uncut is the ultimate American police trooper blooper reel.

programme.title: Cops Uncut UK: Episode 9
programme.desc: With candid dashboard camera footage of bungled arrests, kamikaze crooks and cop-based carnage of all shapes and sizes, Cops Uncut is the ultimate American police trooper blooper reel.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Homecoming
programme.desc: On her first day back at 15 Division, Andy must work with Swarek to track down an ex convict determined to get his old life back at any cost. Andy realizes just how much has changed since she walked away from her old life six months ago

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Different, Not Better
programme.desc: Andy is partnered with Swarek’s new girlfriend, Officer Marlo Cruz. When they come face-to-face with an out of control EDP [Emotionally Disturbed Person], their differences are put to the test and one of them has to pull the trigger.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Kids Are Not Alright
programme.desc: Andy has her sights set on a much-needed long weekend. But when a routine highway check leads to the discovery of a teenage boy in the trunk of a car, Andy and Gail must convince him that no heartache lasts forever

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Poison Pill
programme.desc: After a messy drug arrest, Andy and Marlo are quarantined together. Meanwhile, 15 Division springs into emergency response mode in order to get the contaminated drugs off the streets before a deadly outbreak sweeps through the city.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Skeletons
programme.desc: When a young woman is reported missing, the officers of 15 Division soon discover a possible copycat connection to one of their division’s most distressing cases. With the clock ticking, Gail must face her worst fears..

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Friday the 13th
programme.desc: When human bones found in a ravine open up a 15-year-old missing persons case, Swarek reunites with his old training officer to solve the case

programme.title: Rookie Blue: For Better, For Worse
programme.desc: Everyone at 15 Division, especially Andy, just wants a quick, smooth shift so they can get to Frank and Noelle’s wedding. But things get complicated when they get called to a hijacked casino bus full of senior citizens

programme.title: Rookie Blue: What I Lost
programme.desc: When Chris returns for a visit, his reunion takes a shocking turn when his son, Christian, is abducted while under the care of Andy and Nick

programme.title: Rookie Blue: You Are Here
programme.desc: Near the end of shift, 15 Division busts a marijuana grow-op – a case that becomes Traci’s first homicide and forces Andy, Nick and Gail to work overtime

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Deception
programme.desc: When a suspected pedophile is found beaten within an inch of his life, Andy discovers Marlo has been conducting a mania-fueled, off-hours “investigation”

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Under Fire
programme.desc: After Andy and Chloe take fire from an unseen shooter, the officers realize they are the targets of someone with a grudge against 15 Division

programme.title: Rookie Blue: You Can See the Stars
programme.desc: In the wake of a targeted attack on the officers of 15 Division (ep. 412), Andy, Swarek, and their fellow officers have to piece together the truth about a past crime in order to find Oliver Shaw – in time to save his life

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Blink
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the night’s traumatic events, Andy and Dov try to pull themselves together at an all-night diner, but are caught off-duty and off-guard in a volatile diner hold-up.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: All by Her Selfie
programme.desc: Oliver gets promoted and Andy is tasked with training 15 Division’s newest rookie, Duncan Moore. But when Andy and Duncan respond to a messy homicide at a pawnshop, it’s clear this rookie is going to give Andy the challenge of a lifetime.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Heart Breakers, Money Makers
programme.desc: When Andy and Nick’s seizure at an illegal gambling house leads to a suspicious confession, Andy recruits Sam to help figure out who’s lying, why, and where the money is, before anyone gets hurt.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Wanting
programme.desc: When a tenement-building shooting leads to the discovery of an executed gang leader, 15 Division must race to find the killer before a gang war breaks out

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Going Under
programme.desc: When 15 Division goes undercover at a club-land bar that’s a possible hub for illegal handguns, Chris’s erratic behavior and concern for a specific drug dealer make Dov suspicious.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Two Truths and a Lie
programme.desc: As the officers of 15 Division try to hunt down the killer of Brian Gowdy – Andy and Sam go on the road to interview a list of inmates at Millburn Penitentiary.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Deal with the Devil
programme.desc: In the midst of a chaotic day at the station, Oliver prepares Andy to defend herself at Duncan’s dismissal hearing, now happening two hours from now

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Exit Strategy
programme.desc: Chris’s addiction issues come to a head when an innocuous call to a middle-class home puts Dov and Chris in the middle of a suspicious home invasion investigation

programme.title: Megan Leavey
programme.desc: Young Marine Cpl. Megan Leavey starts to identify with Rex, a particularly aggressive combat dog that she trains. Together, they complete more than 100 missions until an improvised explosive device injures both, putting their fates in jeopardy.

programme.title: Held Up
programme.desc: Yuppie Alex (Jamie Foxx) stops for gas at a remote convenience store, gets dumped by his fiancee (Nia Long) and becomes a hostage during a robbery.

programme.title: From Prada to Nada
programme.desc: After the sudden death of their father leaves them penniless, two spoiled sisters (Camilla Belle, Alexa Vega) get a rude awakening when they must live with their aunt in East L.A.

programme.title: The Choice
programme.desc: An irresistible attraction leads to a blossoming romance between a feisty medical student (Teresa Palmer) and her new neighbor (Benjamin Walker).

programme.title: 3 Generations
programme.desc: Hoping to get support from his mother (Naomi Watts) and grandmother (Susan Sarandon), a New York teen (Elle Fanning) prepares to transition from female to male.

programme.title: From Prada to Nada
programme.desc: After the sudden death of their father leaves them penniless, two spoiled sisters (Camilla Belle, Alexa Vega) get a rude awakening when they must live with their aunt in East L.A.

programme.title: The Choice
programme.desc: An irresistible attraction leads to a blossoming romance between a feisty medical student (Teresa Palmer) and her new neighbor (Benjamin Walker).

programme.title: After Life
programme.desc: Balu falls in love with Swapna at first sight, but their parents oppose the match and suggest they wait a year to see if they are truly in love.

programme.title: The Ninth Gate
programme.desc: A rare-book broker (Johnny Depp), hired by a wealthy collector (Frank Langella), discovers his latest find may hold the key to summoning Satan.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: The team struggles to disempower a military colonel who has threatened to unleash a nuclear holocaust.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Ashlocke goes back in time to try and make himself invincible by giving something to his the younger self, prompting Brennan and Shalimar to follow him.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: The team heads into the wilderness to track down a killer beast which is targeting hikers.

programme.title: Flash Gordon Conquers the Universe: The Palace of Terror
programme.desc: Flash Gordon, Dale Arden and Dr. Zarkov return to the planet Mongo for an antidote to the Purple Death, which wreaking destruction on Earth. However, Ming the Merciless has other plans for them.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Moonscape
programme.desc: Augur is forced to take part in a Taelon experiment. Da'an and Liam try to convince Zo'or that altering minds and implanting humans to make them aggressive to fight the Jaridians is not the correct path. Maiya makes contact with Sandoval.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Sleepers
programme.desc: A Jaridian probe lands on Earth and begins sucking energy from the Comonality. The Taelons use humans in a near-death state to keep their connection while Lili and Sandoval try to find out what is draining the energy.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Fissures
programme.desc: When large scale blackouts begin to occur in cities with portals, Taelon technology is blamed. Augur and Liam investigate the death of a portal worker by a strange creature that feeds on energy and is particularly attracted to the Taelons.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Redemption
programme.desc: Siobhan falls while rock climbing. As the others search for her, she dreams that she is on trial for supporting the Taelons. Zo'or questions whether Sandoval's CVI imperative to serve the Taelons has broken down as others are experiencing.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Between Heaven and Hell
programme.desc: Dr. Belman's daughter does human testing on herself with an accelerant that causes her to rapidly evolve. Joshua Doors decides somebody should run against President Thompson in the election, somebody who will stand up to the Taelons.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Isabel
programme.desc: Maiya experiences dimensional phasing. Augur and Liam believe they need to bring Isabel and Maiya together to let the universe merge them. Jonathan Doors announces his presidential candidacy and meets with Zo'or.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: An escaped Jiridian takes Lili hostage. Their shuttle is sucked on to a Kimera ship where they, with Liam, have to go through an obstacle course to get to the core to exit.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Using Jiridian technology, scientists create a physical bio surrogates where a human consciousness can be transferred. When a surrogate escapes, they must find it before it uses its fighting and weapons knowledge.

programme.title: The Lost World: All or Nothing
programme.desc: After watching Summerlee fall from a destroyed bridge, Marguerite and Veronica attempt to find him. Tribune rescues Roxton but expects payment in kind.

programme.title: The Lost World: Amazons
programme.desc: The men find themselves embraced by a tribe of Amazons and discover they are to be studs for the breeding ritual, but this purpose may come with a fatal end.

programme.title: The Lost World: Tourist Season
programme.desc: Challenger builds a windmill. But when his generator is struck by lightning, a portal is opened that ushers in a helicopter carrying a family of tourists from the year 2000.

programme.title: The Lost World: Stone Cold
programme.desc: An ominous castle draws three of the adventurers under its paranormal influence. Roxton, Marguerite, and Malone take on new personalities while the mansion entangles them in a love triangle.

programme.title: The Lost World: Divine Right
programme.desc: A riderless horse leads Roxton to a tribe that makes him king. He must either accept the title or face execution, while the rest of the group is captured.

programme.title: Sanctuary: The Hollow Men
programme.desc: Now with the real keystone in her possession, Magnus tells Adam Worth she is leaving to find the hidden city. Although he warns her of great danger there, she insists he stay behind and promises to bring back the cure to their radiation illness

programme.title: Sanctuary: Pax Romana
programme.desc: When we left Magnus, Will, Henry and Kate, they had met with a hostile welcome upon gaining access to the city of Praxis in Hollow Earth.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Hangover
programme.desc: Finding the front door left ajar and furniture turned over, Magnus arrives home to discover the building’s defense protocols disabled, no one in sight, and the Sanctuary in alarming disarray.

programme.title: Sanctuary: One Night
programme.desc: Will and Abby go on a dinner date, but on the way to the restaurant, their flirtatious exchange is abruptly halted when they are forced into a van at gunpoint.

programme.title: Confessions Of An Alien Abductee
programme.desc: Chantelle, Marie and Simon are all alien abductees. These ordinary people share their extraordinary stories as they seek help through the curiously named Anomalous Mind Management Abductee Contactee Helpline, or AMMACH.

programme.title: Aliens Against Nuclear War: Edgar Mitchell
programme.desc: 12 moonwalkers claim ET visited Earth, govt covered it up. Aliens stopped nuclear war. Crazy or worth hearing more?

programme.title: The Hills' Abduction: The Zeta Reticuli Incident
programme.desc: Barney & Betty Hill's abduction and the Zeta reticuli incident explored.

programme.title: Alien Reptilian Legacy
programme.desc: Researchers reveal the presence of a supreme and nefarious interdimensional intelligence that has been manipulating mankind for centuries. Interviews with experiencers and alien abductees expose a sinister agenda behind the alien presence on Earth.

programme.title: Project Serpo
programme.desc: 2005: Ex-agent unveils 3,000-page report on a secret ET exchange mission to planet Serpo

programme.title: Alien Paranormal: Bigfoot, UFOs and the Men in Black
programme.desc: Are Bigfoot creatures traveling to earth in UFO's, and being covered-up by Men in Black? Experience terrifying, real events as documented by top authorities, including: Aliens attacking a house; Alien Abductions to create a hybrid race; vortexes and more!

programme.title: Close Encounters: Proof of Alien Contact
programme.desc: This documentary examines whether UFOs are real. It studies over 250 amateur video clips, evaluates several recent revelations about Roswell, and examines footage of the removal of an alien implant.

programme.title: Alien Agenda: Planet Earth
programme.desc: Alien Agenda Planet Earth reveals the shocking truth about UFOs and Extraterrestrials, a truth that has been suppressed and hidden for centuries.

programme.title: From the Mothman to the Reptilians: A Guide to Alien Species
programme.desc: Witnesses from around the world have had close encounters with extraterrestrial races, shaping our imagination and becoming cultural phenomena.

programme.title: 27 Alien Encounters
programme.desc: Strange and bizarre UFO encounters abound, but recent Alien encounters by highly credible eyewitnesses are so unusual and perplexing that they challenge our understanding of physics and the Universe as we know it.

programme.title: Ancient Engineers: Aliens On Earth
programme.desc: Our evolution may be influenced by our ancestors and their Gods. We are not alone in the universe.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Belgian UFO
programme.desc: This episode includes: Belgian UFO, (Pts. 1 & 2), UD: I.D. Swap, Brenda's Fire and Philip Breen & UD.

programme.title: Alien Mass Sightings: The Undeniable Truth
programme.desc: Documentary analyzes mass alien sightings, questions reliability of official explanations, identifies common patterns for further investigation.

programme.title: Alien Global Threat
programme.desc: New evidence reveals that world governments have had a pact with aliens for decades and that human abductions are being allowed by government and military factions.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 4
programme.desc: The team help Georgie, who had such a wild time with the boys on holiday she commemorated the trip with a tattoo that's left her single ever since. Alice takes on Kelly's animation-inspired disaster.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 1
programme.desc: Jay saves Luke's bacon with a polished portrait. Sketch beautifies Mark's belly Buddha.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 6
programme.desc: Sketch meets Gaz, who has his best friend's initials in an intimate place, and the whole team are shocked by the cover-up he wants. Jay gives Lady Gaga superfan Harry the portrait of his dreams.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 3
programme.desc: Glamour model Bex wants to put her Jedward tattoo behind her, and Andy has an inspirational tattoo story. Annie hopes to fix a tattoo that, after a mid-inking disagreement, didn't turn out as planned.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 15
programme.desc: Hayley's cheeky cartoon tattoo is threatening to derail her wedding plans. Mick wants to cover an X-rated inking that's causing embarrassment to his daughter. Dom's saucy camel is giving him the hump.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 7
programme.desc: Sketch tackles Nick's measuring stick, while Glen helps heathen Bob get an honour inking.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 5
programme.desc: Jay gives Ian a portrait that has to be seen to be believed and Alice covers Linsey's scar.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 11
programme.desc: Alice gets her claws into dog-lover William's cover when he betrays his furry friends in ink. Emma disguises her tattooed equations after attempts to impress her maths teacher didn't add up.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 5
programme.desc: Lou helps tomboy Lucy, who has a vulgar phrase tattooed on her leg. Skater boy Matt shows Sketch a tattoo in an unsightly place. Jay assists Amina, who thinks getting inked is worse than giving birth.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 15
programme.desc: Nathan banishes his bad luck back tatt. Ollie's wheezy Magaluf inking is sent into orbit.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 1
programme.desc: Jay banishes Ant's backside buddy, and Alice helps Chelsea get over the shock of her life.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 2
programme.desc: Alice tackles Beverley's backside blunder. Jay wipes Bailey's holiday Poomoji tatt clean.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 9
programme.desc: Ladies' man Ash needs help covering an embarrassing portrait of his beloved mum. Sean wants a cover for his leg tattoo of two dogs doing what comes naturally. Dancer Jay-Jay loses her X-rated tatt.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 1
programme.desc: Vicky celebrates her family with an animal tribute tattoo, Abby's cringe-worthy celebrity crush is covered, Jordan needs to lose the ink he got to win an argument, and Adam has a rather personal tatt.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 13
programme.desc: Harry wants a memorial tattoo dedicated to a very intimate part of himself after surviving testicular cancer. Matt has doodled on his own legs with a tattoo machine his parents got him for Christmas.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 2
programme.desc: Respectable dad Stephen aims to see the back of a crude tattoo he had 20 years ago. Tattoo-mad ex-solider Rob's phallic self-portrait is a step too far, and Leeanneah has lyrics tattooed on her chest.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 2
programme.desc: Sketch slays Fiona's zombie, while Glen gives magician George a frightening new friend.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 10
programme.desc: Jay gives Leuan a tribute to his late sister, while Sketch evicts the eye on Mike's thigh.

programme.desc: Steal My Sunshine (Len) / Walking On Sunshine (Katrina & The Waves) / Rock DJ (Robbie Williams) / Mysterious Girl (Peter Andre) / Rio (Duran Duran) / Umbrella (Rihanna Ft. Jay-Z) / Summertime (DJ Jazzy Jeff & The Fresh Prince) / Club Tropicana (Wham)

programme.desc: A young racing driver learns how to handle the unique and venerable racing car the Napier-Railton, built in the 1930s. Plus, a race winning Harrier jump-jet, and its pilot, are reunited.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: The motorbike team create a new lubrication system to keep a 1930s BSA motorbike running. Plus, a Mini Metro and red Corvette turn heads at the Members Classic Car Show.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: A rare Brooklands glider is given a new chance at flight. Plus, a 1930s race team is pushed to the max at Goodwood.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: A trip to the Bentley Bentayga headquarters in Crewe reveals just how a luxury SUV is designed, built and delivered to the customer. Titch Cormack is in Cornwall uncovering a game-changing early SUV.

programme.desc: Catie Munnings tests the BAC Mono R at Goodwood Circuit, Duncan Pittaway explores the classic Bugatti Type 35, and engineer Dan Dickrell heads off to Florida to witness swamp racing.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: A look at the life of Mary Magdelene, a key figure in Christianity who witnessed Jesus's crucifixion and resurrection after travelling with him.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Mystery still surrounds how fascist dictator Benito Mussolini met his end, before being hanged in Milan's Piazzale Loreto. Jamie Theakston seeks out answers.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: The Vatican Secret Archives is a treasure trove of history that is shrouded in secrecy. Jamie Theakston heads to Rome in a bid to gain access.
programme.sub-title: The Secrets of the Vatican Archives

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston uncovers more about the ruthless Johann Reichhart, a German state executioner who killed around 3,000 people during World War Two, many of them for resisting National Socialism.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: The Vatican Secret Archives is a treasure trove of history that is shrouded in secrecy. Jamie Theakston heads to Rome in a bid to gain access.
programme.sub-title: The Secrets of the Vatican Archives

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston exposes a secret unit who murdered Bulgarian dissidents. One victim, Georgi Markov, was famously killed with a ricin-tipped umbrella.
programme.sub-title: The Secrets of the Murder Bureau

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: A look at the different challenges faced by the orthodox beliefs about the order that angered much of Europe, especially France.
programme.sub-title: The Dark Truths of the Templars

programme.desc: All the thrills and copious spills from the Red Bull Soapbox Race series, in which rival teams tested their gravity-powered vehicles against obstacle-littered courses.

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: An ascent used in cycling's Amstel Gold Race plays host to an entertaining event, as teams of racers career downhill in their homemade boxes.

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race

programme.desc: Holland isn't known for its steep inclines, but things are going downhill fast in Valkenburg as racers pit their wacky, engineless roadsters against a perilous course!

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Celeb 1 - Big Narstie, Kelly, Greg, Jorgie, Alfie
programme.desc: Olympic legend Dame Kelly Holmes takes charge of grime MC Big Narstie, actress Jorgie Porter, internet superstar Alfie Deyes and fellow gold medallist Greg Rutherford on an action-packed journey to the Crystal Dome.
programme.sub-title: Celeb 1 - Big Narstie, Kelly, Greg, Jorgie, Alfie

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 9
programme.desc: Pop star and captain Fleur East leads this thespian filled episode of the Crystal Maze guiding actors John Thompson, Nina Wadia and Natalie Cassidy as well as realty TV’s Georgia “Toff” Toffolo on a wild ride full of twists and turns in every zone.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 2
programme.desc: Maze Master Richard Ayoade is convinced that all successful teams entering the maze are captained by women. Will presenter Anita Rani be the first to fail spectacularly?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Celeb 4 - Joe, Radzi, Kate, Ashley, Richard
programme.desc: This week broadcasting legend Richard Madeley captains his team featuring comedian Joe Wilkinson, broadcaster Kate Garraway, Blue Peter’s Radzi Chinyanganya, and Pussycat Dolls star Ashley Roberts.
programme.sub-title: Celeb 4 - Joe, Radzi, Kate, Ashley, Richard

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 4
programme.desc: Tonight's celebrity adventurers are Spencer Matthews, Stacey Solomon, Tom Allen, Andrea McLean and Joe Swash.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 6
programme.desc: This week’s intrepid band of celebrity Mazekateers are ably led by ‘dad vibe’ BAFTA winning actor and League Of Gentlemen lynchpin Steve Pemberton. Hot stepping support comes in the form of Strictly’s Oti Mabuse and Naked Attraction’s Anna Richardson.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 3
programme.desc: Crystal Maze team captain actor Nancy Sorrell leads her fellow adventurers, comedian Jim Moir (AKA: Vic Reeves), reality TV’s Ferne McCann, former cricketer Graeme Swann and comedian Susan Calman, on a wild ride through the 4 zones.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Celeb 3 - David, Wayne, Rachel, Charlotte, Judy
programme.desc: Judy Murray captains a team of celebs hoping to ace their way to the Crystal Dome. Paralympic David Weir, footballer Wayne Bridge, Countdown's Rachel Riley and TV’s Charlotte Crosby all combine to tackle skill, physical, mystery and mental challenges.
programme.sub-title: Celeb 3 - David, Wayne, Rachel, Charlotte, Judy

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Celeb 2 - Dennis, Katie, Bez Roman, Binky
programme.desc: Former footballer Dennis Wise captains a celebrity team including DJ Roman Kemp, Made in Chelsea's Binky Felstead, Happy Mondays maraca shaker Bez, and published author Katie Price.
programme.sub-title: Celeb 2 - Dennis, Katie, Bez Roman, Binky

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 12
programme.desc: TV presenter Laura Whitmore Captains her team; comedian Chris Ramsey, dancers Perri Kiely and Jordan Banjo, and retired rugby player Gareth Thomas into a world of physical, mental, skilful and mysterious challenges.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 4
programme.desc: This gathering of the Crystal Maze is captained by actor Sunetra Sarker as she pilots plucky TV broadcaster Matthew Wright, seasoned politician Anne Widdecombe actor Nikki Sampson and reality TV Hunk Wes Nelson.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 11
programme.desc: This week Pop star Faye Tozer steps up as team captain of the latest celebrity supergroup to tackle the crystal maze.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 8
programme.desc: This show sees DJ Matt Edmondson lead his teammates TV legend Debbie McGee, dancer Kimberley Wyatt, retired footballer Michael Owen and reality TV star Chris Hughes.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 7
programme.desc: This episode has actress Tamzin Outhwaite commandeering former cricketer Phil Tufnell, TV Doctor Dr Ranj Singh, reality TV star Francis Boulle and Comedian/TV presenter Joel Dommett through a phalanx of challenges.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 3
programme.desc: This week’s celebrities taking on the maze are Rylan Clarke, Adil Ray, Tamara Wall and Joel Dommett.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 2
programme.desc: Tonight’s celebrity adventurers are Ore Oduba, Vicky Pattison, Alex Brooker, Lydia Bright and Louie Spence.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 5
programme.desc: This instalment of the Crystal Maze sees DJ Melvin Odoom captain comedian Al Murray, actor Kara Tointon, reality TV stalwart Olivia Attwood and actor Ashley Taylor-Dawson through the ubiquitous 4 zones.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 1
programme.desc: Gemma Collins – with team mates James “Arg” Argent, legendary TV personality Carol Vorderman, comedian Ellie Taylor and TV presenter Rick Edwards fighting to maintain any sense of decorum and to get a word in edge wise.
